Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT A.* , A.SUB_NUM * A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE as TOTAL , K0.SER_KEY_NAME+' '+ISNULL(K1.SER_KEY_NAME,'') SER_DES , SM.SUP_NAME , JNY.ENQ_JNY_DATE , JNY.ENQ_JNY_DAY , JNY.WAY_CODE , CT.CITY_NAME , CT.CITY_NAME_EN FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY JNY ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID = JNY.ENQ_JNY_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY K0 ON A.SER_KEY0=K0.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY K1 ON A.SER_KEY1=K1.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN SM ON a.SUP_DOWN_ID = SM.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN CITY CT ON A.SER_CITY_ID = CT.CITY_ID WHERE A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND JNY.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID AND (JNY.ENQ_JNY_ID = @REF_ENQ_JNY_ID) AND a.SER_ID not in (1, 5, 7) -- 机票、签证、景点服务 order by JNY.ENQ_JNY_DAY, a.SER_ID

Set.Sql: SELECT SER_KEY_ID, SER_KEY_NAME, SER_KEY_NAME_EN FROM SER_KEY A INNER JOIN SER_MAIN B ON A.SER_ID = B.SER_ID AND B.SER_TAG = 'SER_TAG_MEAL' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT b.SER_KEY_NAME KEY2 ,count(1) SER_NUM from ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a inner join ENQ_JNY ej on a.ENQ_JNY_ID = ej.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN SER_KEY b on a.SER_KEY0 = b.SER_KEY_ID inner join SER_MAIN c on b.SER_ID=c.SER_ID where ej.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID and c.SER_TAG = 'SER_TAG_MEAL' and b.SER_KEY_STATUS = 'USED' group by b.SER_KEY_NAME ) C ON A.SER_KEY_NAME = C.KEY2 WHERE a.SER_KEY_STATUS = 'USED' AND SUP_ID = @g_sup_id ORDER BY SER_NUM DESC,SER_KEY_ORD, SER_KEY_ID

select cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY as int) as ed,'D'+cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY as varchar(10))+' ['+WAY_CODE+']' as ENQ_JNY_DAY , ENQ_JNY_ID , F_ADD , TO_ADD , TO_ADD2 , CITY_ID FROM ENQ_JNY WHERE ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID ORDER BY ed

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT A.*, @EWA.PATH_UPLOAD_URL + B.PIC_PATH + '$resized/320x240.jpg' AS ENQ_PIC FROM ENQ_JNY A LEFT JOIN PIC_MAIN B ON B.REF_ID = A.ENQ_JNY_ID AND B.REF_TAG = 'ENQ_JNY' AND B.PIC_STATUS = 'WEB_NWS_DLV' WHERE A.ENQ_JNY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND A.enq_id = @enq_id ;
SELECT HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM as nums from ENQ_MAIN em WHERE ENQ_ID=@enq_id;

Set.Sql: select enq_car_id as car_id ,enq_hotel_id as hotel_id from enq_main where enq_id=@enq_id; select top 1 city_id f_add , ENQ_JNY_DAY+1 ENQ_JNY_DAY ,ENQ_JNY_DATE+1 ENQ_JNY_DATE from enq_jny where enq_id=@enq_id order by ENQ_JNY_DAY desc

select A.SER_ID, A.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID, A.ser_conn_id,B.SUP_ID AS sup_id, A.sup_down_id ,a.sub_num ,b.SER_KEY0, b.SER_KEY1, b.SER_KEY2,b.CITY_ID,a.enq_jny_price from enq_jny_ser_sub A LEFT JOIN SER_CONN B ON A.SER_CONN_ID=B.SER_CONN_ID
where a.enq_jny_id=@enq_jny_id and A.sup_id=@g_sup_id

order by enq_jny_id desc

Set.Name: GetDayDes SQL
Set.Sql: --服务描述 SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID, EJD_TAG, EJD_TIME_BEGIN, EJD_TIME_END,EDJ_PLACE_BEGIN ,EDJ_PLACE_END,EDJ_REMARK,EJD_CITY_ID,SER_KEY0,SER_KEY1,SER_KEY2 ,A.DAY_NAME, B.REC_NAME,C.SER_ID FROM ENQ_JNY_DAY A LEFT JOIN REC_MAIN B ON A.GUIDE1=B.REC_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY C ON A.SER_KEY0=C.SER_KEY_ID WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND ENQ_JNY_DAY IN ( SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY FROM ENQ_JNY WHERE ENQ_JNY_ID=@ENQ_JNY_ID ) AND EJD_CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND EJD_TAG IS NOT NULL

Set.Name: GetEditSerConn SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 1 A.*,B.SUP_NAME FROM SER_CONN A INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN B ON A.SUP_ID=B.SUP_ID WHERE SER_ID=@SER_ID AND CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND own_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID and not SER_CONN_UPDATE_TIME is null and @tp=1 ORDER BY SER_CONN_UPDATE_TIME DESC ) AA UNION SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 1 A.*,B.SUP_NAME FROM SER_CONN A INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN B ON A.SUP_ID=B.SUP_ID WHERE SER_ID=@SER_ID AND CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND own_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID and @tp=0 ORDER BY SER_CONN_ID DESC ) BB

Set.Name: saveinfo
Set.Sql: UPDATE enq_jny SET enq_jny_day = @enq_jny_day , enq_jny_date = @enq_jny_date , traffic = @traffic , air_no = @air_no , air_time = @air_time , enq_jny_content = @enq_jny_content , ENQ_JNY_CONTENT_EN=@ENQ_JNY_CONTENT_EN , MEAL_ID=@MEAL_ID WHERE enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id and sup_id = @g_sup_id

Set.Name: 保存营地上课信息 sql
检查营地状况 sql
Set.Sql: SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY, CAMP_CLASS_TAG FROM ENQ_JNY WHERE ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID AND SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND NOT (CAMP_CLASS_TAG ='' OR CAMP_CLASS_TAG IS NULL) ORDER BY ENQ_JNY_DAY

Set.Name: 订单信息
Set.Sql:
SELECT a.ENQ_OP_ID , C.SELECT_STATE , C.FLOW_STATE , B.ENQ_JNY_DAY , A.SER_KEY0 , A.SER_KEY1 , A.SER_KEY2 , A.SER_CITY_ID , A.SUB_NUM as SUB_NUM_SUP , a.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP , a.COIN_ID_SUP , D.SUP_NAME , D.SUP_ID FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB A INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY B ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID=B.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN C ON C.ENQ_OP_ID=A.ENQ_OP_ID INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN D ON C.SUP_ID = D.SUP_ID WHERE C.ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID AND ENQ_OP_STATE='USED' ORDER BY C.SELECT_STATE DESC, D.SUP_NAME ;
SELECT SUPS.*, B.PAY_REAL ,C.COIN_NAME, C.COIN_KEY FROM ( -- 所有供应商和货币 SELECT GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, RELATE_SUP_ID AS SUP_ID, COIN_ID, SUM(COS_PRICE) AS PAY_PLAN FROM grp_fin_type where grp_id=@grp_id and fin_type='0' AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM IN('ENQ_OP_MAIN','GRP_SER_SP') and sup_id = @G_SUP_ID GROUP BY GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID ) SUPS LEFT JOIN ( -- 实际支出 SELECT PAY_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, SUM(ACCOUNT) AS PAY_REAL FROM GRP_PAY_APPLY A INNER JOIN grp_fin_type B ON A.GRP_FIN_TYPE=B.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM IN('ENQ_OP_MAIN','GRP_SER_SP') WHERE A.GRP_ID = @grp_id AND APPLY_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND APPLY_STATUS = 'VIS_FIN_END' GROUP BY PAY_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID ) B ON SUPS.SUP_ID = B.PAY_SUP_ID AND SUPS.COIN_ID = B.COIN_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN C ON SUPS.COIN_ID = C.COIN_ID ;

Set.Sql: SELECT SER_KEY_ID, SER_KEY_NAME, SER_KEY_NAME_EN FROM SER_KEY A INNER JOIN SER_MAIN B ON A.SER_ID = B.SER_ID AND B.SER_TAG = 'SER_TAG_MEAL' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT b.SER_KEY_NAME KEY2 ,count(1) SER_NUM from ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a inner join ENQ_JNY ej on a.ENQ_JNY_ID = ej.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN SER_KEY b on a.SER_KEY0 = b.SER_KEY_ID inner join SER_MAIN c on b.SER_ID=c.SER_ID where ej.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID and c.SER_TAG = 'SER_TAG_MEAL' and b.SER_KEY_STATUS = 'USED' group by b.SER_KEY_NAME ) C ON A.SER_KEY_NAME = C.KEY2 WHERE a.SER_KEY_STATUS = 'USED' AND SUP_ID = @g_sup_id ORDER BY SER_NUM DESC,SER_KEY_ORD, SER_KEY_ID

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT a.* FROM( SELECT A.SER_KEY_ID, A.SER_CONN_ID, A.SUP_ID, A.OWN_SUP_ID, A.SER_ID, A.SER_PRICE, A.COIN_ID, A.SER_KEY_NAME, A.SER_KEY_NAME2, A.SER_NAME, A.SER_GROUP, A.SER_CONN_CREATE_TIME, A.SER_CONN_STATE, A.SER_CERT, A.SER_CERT_end, B.BAS_TAG_NAME SER_CERT_NAME, A.SER_CONN_SDATE, A.SER_CONN_EDATE , isnull(SER_CONN_UPDATE_TIME,SER_CONN_CREATE_TIME) SER_CONN_LTIME, CASE WHEN PPL_NUM>0 THEN PPL_NUM ELSE NULL END PPL_NUM, SM.SER_TAG, case when @ewa_lang = 'enus' and isnull(sup.SUP_NAME_en,'') !='' then sup.SUP_NAME_en else sup.sup_name end as SUP_NAME, rm.REC_STAR, a.SER_CONN_CAT_ID, a.SER_KEY0, a.SER_KEY1, case when s.SUB_SUP_ID>0 then -1 when a.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID then 0 else 1 end LUKE_SUP, case when SER_KEY1>0 then k0.SER_KEY_REMARK+char(10)+k1.SER_KEY_REMARK else k0.SER_KEY_REMARK end SER_KEY_REMARK FROM V_SER_SET_ROB a INNER JOIN SER_MAIN SM ON A.SER_ID=SM.SER_ID left join SER_KEY k0 on a.SER_KEY0=k0.SER_KEY_ID left join SER_KEY k1 on a.SER_KEY1=k1.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B ON A.SER_CERT=B.BAS_TAG INNER JOIN CITY E ON A.CITY_ID=E.CITY_ID inner join SUP_MAIN sup on a.sup_id=sup.sup_id left join REC_MAIN rm on k0.REC_ID=rm.REC_ID and k0.SER_KEY_GRP='HOTEL0' left join (SELECT distinct SUB_SUP_ID from ADM_USER_GRP_SUB augs where SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID) s on sup.SUP_ID=s.SUB_SUP_ID WHERE A.SER_CONN_STATE = 'USED' AND A.SER_ID=@SER_ID AND (A.CITY_ID = @city_id or a.CITY_ID IN (SELECT COUNTRY_ID FROM CITY WHERE CITY_ID=@CITY_ID)) AND A.OWN_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID and convert(date,getdate()) BETWEEN a.SER_CONN_SDATE and a.SER_CONN_EDATE ) a WHERE 1=1 order by LUKE_SUP,a.sup_id desc

插入当天的缺省接待信息
保存营地上课信息 sql
获取已存在的服务列表

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT A.*, @EWA.PATH_UPLOAD_URL + B.PIC_PATH + '$resized/320x240.jpg' AS ENQ_PIC, em.HEAD_NUM + em.PEOPLE_NUM AS NUMS, em.FLOW_STATE, case when A.sup_id = @g_sup_id then 'SELF' -- 路嘉 when dj.sup_id > 0 then 'GROUND' -- 地接分公司 when suply.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DATE is not null then 'SUPPLY' -- 供应商 else 'UNKNOW' -- 不可能 END AS OP_TYPE FROM ENQ_JNY A LEFT JOIN PIC_MAIN B ON B.REF_ID = A.ENQ_JNY_ID AND B.REF_TAG = 'ENQ_JNY' AND B.PIC_STATUS = 'WEB_NWS_DLV' -- 2024-09-18 王总 地接系统可以直接参与到修改总部的行程信息 LEFT JOIN ADM_USER_GRP_SUB dj ON a.sup_id = dj.SUP_ID AND dj.SUB_ADM_ID = @g_adm_id AND dj.SUB_SUP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN enq_main em ON a.enq_id = em.enq_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT b.enq_op_id, b.ENQ_ID , FRO_ENQ_JNY_DATE FROM enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.ENQ_OP_ID = b.ENQ_OP_ID WHERE SUP_DOWN_ID = @g_sup_id ) suply on a.enq_jny_date = suply.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DATE and a.ENQ_ID = suply.ENQ_ID WHERE A.ENQ_JNY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND A.enq_id = @enq_id AND ( A.sup_id = @g_sup_id OR dj.sup_id > 0 OR suply.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DATE is not null ); SELECT head_num, people_num, head_num + people_num as nums FROM enq_main WHERE enq_id = @enq_id; -- 关联营地的成本团 2024-09-24 SELECT camp_id AS cost_camp_id, CO_STUDENT, CO_CS, CO_CS_MEDIA, CO_CS_MEDICAL, CO_FOREIGN_TEACHER, CO_CHINES_TEACHAR FROM camp_open co WHERE co.co_cost_grp_id = @grp_id;
-- 营地关联的 ser_key0 SELECT ser_key_id AS camp0_key_id FROM ser_key WHERE SER_KEY_REF_BASE = 'CAMP_MAIN' AND REF_ID = @cost_camp_id AND SER_KEY_STATUS = 'USED' AND SER_ID = 11 AND ser_key_grp = 'CAMP0';

Set.Name: GetDayDes SQL
Set.Sql: --服务描述 SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID, EJD_TAG, EJD_TIME_BEGIN, EJD_TIME_END,EDJ_PLACE_BEGIN ,EDJ_PLACE_END,EDJ_REMARK,EJD_CITY_ID,SER_KEY0,SER_KEY1,SER_KEY2 ,A.DAY_NAME, B.REC_NAME,C.SER_ID FROM ENQ_JNY_DAY A LEFT JOIN REC_MAIN B ON A.GUIDE1=B.REC_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY C ON A.SER_KEY0=C.SER_KEY_ID WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND ENQ_JNY_DAY IN ( SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY FROM ENQ_JNY WHERE ENQ_JNY_ID=@ENQ_JNY_ID ) AND EJD_CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND EJD_TAG IS NOT NULL

Set.Name: GetEditSerConn SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 1 A.*,B.SUP_NAME FROM SER_CONN A INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN B ON A.SUP_ID=B.SUP_ID WHERE SER_ID=@SER_ID AND CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND own_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID and not SER_CONN_UPDATE_TIME is null and @tp=1 ORDER BY SER_CONN_UPDATE_TIME DESC ) AA UNION SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 1 A.*,B.SUP_NAME FROM SER_CONN A INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN B ON A.SUP_ID=B.SUP_ID WHERE SER_ID=@SER_ID AND CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND own_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID and @tp=0 ORDER BY SER_CONN_ID DESC ) BB

Set.Name: saveinfo
Set.Sql: UPDATE enq_jny SET enq_jny_day = @enq_jny_day , enq_jny_date = @enq_jny_date , traffic = @traffic , air_no = @air_no , air_time = @air_time , enq_jny_content = @enq_jny_content , ENQ_JNY_CONTENT_EN=@ENQ_JNY_CONTENT_EN , MEAL_ID=@MEAL_ID WHERE enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id and sup_id = @g_sup_id

Set.Name: 保存营地上课信息 sql
检查营地状况 sql
Set.Sql: SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY, CAMP_CLASS_TAG FROM ENQ_JNY WHERE ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID AND SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND NOT (CAMP_CLASS_TAG ='' OR CAMP_CLASS_TAG IS NULL) ORDER BY ENQ_JNY_DAY

Set.Name: 订单信息
Set.Sql:
-- 订单信息 SELECT a.ENQ_OP_ID, C.SELECT_STATE, C.FLOW_STATE, B.ENQ_JNY_DAY, A.SER_KEY0, A.SER_KEY1, A.SER_KEY2, A.SER_CITY_ID, A.SUB_NUM AS SUB_NUM_SUP, a.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP, a.ENQ_JNY_PRICE, a.COIN_ID_SUP, D.SUP_NAME, D.SUP_ID, A.EOMS_FREE -- 免额（2025-07） FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB A INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY B ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID = B.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN C ON C.ENQ_OP_ID = A.ENQ_OP_ID INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN D ON C.SUP_ID = D.SUP_ID WHERE C.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID AND ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED' ORDER BY C.SELECT_STATE DESC, D.SUP_NAME;
SELECT SUPS.*, B.PAY_REAL, C.COIN_NAME, C.COIN_KEY FROM ( -- 所有供应商和货币 SELECT GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, RELATE_SUP_ID AS SUP_ID, COIN_ID, SUM(COS_PRICE) AS PAY_PLAN FROM grp_fin_type WHERE grp_id = @grp_id AND fin_type = '0' AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM IN ('ENQ_OP_MAIN', 'GRP_SER_SP') AND sup_id = @G_SUP_ID GROUP BY GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID ) SUPS LEFT JOIN ( -- 实际支出 SELECT PAY_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, SUM(ACCOUNT) AS PAY_REAL FROM GRP_PAY_APPLY A INNER JOIN grp_fin_type B ON A.GRP_FIN_TYPE = B.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM IN ('ENQ_OP_MAIN', 'GRP_SER_SP') WHERE A.GRP_ID = @grp_id AND APPLY_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND APPLY_STATUS = 'VIS_FIN_END' GROUP BY PAY_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID ) B ON SUPS.SUP_ID = B.PAY_SUP_ID AND SUPS.COIN_ID = B.COIN_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN C ON SUPS.COIN_ID = C.COIN_ID;

Set.Name: GetModifiedLogs
Set.Sql: SELECT isnull(a.ser_city_id, a.new_ser_city_id) ser_city_id, b.enq_jny_day, isnull(a.ser_id, a.new_ser_id) ser_id, count(*) AS changes FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_LOG a INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY b ON a.ENQ_JNY_ID = b.ENQ_JNY_ID -- 筛选出所有第X天的变化 INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY c ON b.enq_jny_day = c.enq_jny_day AND c.enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id WHERE b.grp_id = @grp_id GROUP BY isnull(a.ser_city_id, a.new_ser_city_id), b.enq_jny_day, isnull(a.ser_id, a.new_ser_id)

Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='JNY_CAT'
SELECT * FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='TRAFFIC'
SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'CAMP_CLASS' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

SELECT SER_KEY_ID, SER_KEY_NAME, SER_KEY_NAME_EN FROM SER_KEY A INNER JOIN SER_MAIN B ON A.SER_ID = B.SER_ID AND B.SER_TAG = 'SER_TAG_MEAL' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT b.SER_KEY_NAME KEY2 ,count(1) SER_NUM from ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a inner join ENQ_JNY ej on a.ENQ_JNY_ID = ej.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN SER_KEY b on a.SER_KEY0 = b.SER_KEY_ID inner join SER_MAIN c on b.SER_ID=c.SER_ID where ej.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID and c.SER_TAG = 'SER_TAG_MEAL' and b.SER_KEY_STATUS = 'USED' group by b.SER_KEY_NAME ) C ON A.SER_KEY_NAME = C.KEY2 WHERE a.SER_KEY_STATUS = 'USED' AND SUP_ID = @g_sup_id ORDER BY SER_NUM DESC,SER_KEY_ORD, SER_KEY_ID

Set.Top:
• 复制过程中，将会完全删除目标日期的相同服务， 例如如果选择中包含“营地服务”，则复制到的日期会将所有“营地服务”删除，并替换成当前选择的服务。
  • 目标日期的行程中应该包含来源日期的城市。

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT A.* , CASE WHEN GUIDE.ID IS NULL THEN 'NO' ELSE 'YES' END GUIDE , CASE WHEN HOTEL.ID IS NULL THEN 'NO' ELSE 'YES' END HOTEL , CASE WHEN CAMP.ID IS NULL THEN 'NO' ELSE 'YES' END CAMP , CASE WHEN [PUBLIC].ID IS NULL THEN 'NO' ELSE 'YES' END [PUBLIC] FROM ENQ_JNY A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_JNY_ID ID FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB A INNER JOIN SER_MAIN B ON A.SER_ID = B.SER_ID AND B.SER_TAG = 'SER_TAG_GUIDE' ) GUIDE ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID = GUIDE.ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_JNY_ID ID FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB A INNER JOIN SER_MAIN B ON A.SER_ID = B.SER_ID AND B.SER_TAG = 'SER_TAG_HOTEL' ) HOTEL ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID = HOTEL.ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_JNY_ID ID FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB A INNER JOIN SER_MAIN B ON A.SER_ID = B.SER_ID AND B.SER_TAG = 'SER_TAG_CAMP' ) CAMP ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID = CAMP.ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_JNY_ID ID FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB A INNER JOIN SER_MAIN B ON A.SER_ID = B.SER_ID AND B.SER_TAG = 'SER_TAG_PUBLIC' ) [PUBLIC] ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID = [PUBLIC].ID WHERE ENQ_JNY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND ( SUP_ID = @g_sup_id OR exists ( SELECT ENQ_ID, a.SUP_ID FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN a WHERE ENQ_OP_ID = @ENQ_OP_ID and a.SUP_ID = @g_sup_id and a.enq_id = @enq_id ) )

Set.Name: OnPagePost SQL
Set.Sql: UPDATE ENQ_JNY SET HOTEL_NAME = @HOTEL_NAME, GUIDE_NAME1 = @GUIDE_NAME1, CAMP_NAME = @CAMP_NAME, PUBLIC_NAME = @PUBLIC_NAME, MEAL_NAME = @MEAL_NAME, CAR_NAME = @CAR_NAME, ENQ_JNY_MDATE = @sys_date, SHOW_CLIENT_TAG = 'YES', STAFF_MEMO = @STAFF_MEMO WHERE ENQ_JNY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND ( SUP_ID = @g_sup_id OR exists ( SELECT ENQ_ID, a.SUP_ID FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN a WHERE ENQ_OP_ID = @ENQ_OP_ID and a.SUP_ID = @g_sup_id and a.enq_id = @enq_id ) )

Set.Sql: --服务描述 SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID, EJD_TAG, EJD_TIME_BEGIN, EJD_TIME_END,EDJ_PLACE_BEGIN ,EDJ_PLACE_END,EDJ_REMARK,EJD_CITY_ID,SER_KEY0,SER_KEY1,SER_KEY2 ,A.DAY_NAME, B.REC_NAME,C.SER_ID FROM ENQ_JNY_DAY A LEFT JOIN REC_MAIN B ON A.GUIDE1=B.REC_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY C ON A.SER_KEY0=C.SER_KEY_ID WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND ENQ_JNY_DAY IN ( SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY FROM ENQ_JNY WHERE ENQ_JNY_ID=@ENQ_JNY_ID ) AND EJD_CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND EJD_TAG IS NOT NULL

Set.Name: GetEditSerConn SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 1 A.*,B.SUP_NAME FROM SER_CONN A INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN B ON A.SUP_ID=B.SUP_ID WHERE SER_ID=@SER_ID AND CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND own_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID and not SER_CONN_UPDATE_TIME is null and @tp=1 ORDER BY SER_CONN_UPDATE_TIME DESC ) AA UNION SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 1 A.*,B.SUP_NAME FROM SER_CONN A INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN B ON A.SUP_ID=B.SUP_ID WHERE SER_ID=@SER_ID AND CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND own_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID and @tp=0 ORDER BY SER_CONN_ID DESC ) BB

Set.Name: 订单信息
Set.Sql:
SELECT a.ENQ_OP_ID , C.SELECT_STATE , C.FLOW_STATE , B.ENQ_JNY_DAY , A.SER_KEY0 , A.SER_KEY1 , A.SER_KEY2 , A.SER_CITY_ID , A.SUB_NUM as SUB_NUM_SUP , a.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP , a.COIN_ID_SUP , D.SUP_NAME , D.SUP_ID FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB A INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY B ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID=B.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN C ON C.ENQ_OP_ID=A.ENQ_OP_ID INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN D ON C.SUP_ID = D.SUP_ID WHERE C.ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID AND ENQ_OP_STATE='USED' ORDER BY C.SELECT_STATE DESC, D.SUP_NAME ;
SELECT SUPS.*, B.PAY_REAL ,C.COIN_NAME, C.COIN_KEY FROM ( -- 所有供应商和货币 SELECT GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, RELATE_SUP_ID AS SUP_ID, COIN_ID, SUM(COS_PRICE) AS PAY_PLAN FROM grp_fin_type where grp_id=@grp_id and fin_type='0' AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM IN('ENQ_OP_MAIN','GRP_SER_SP') and sup_id = @G_SUP_ID GROUP BY GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID ) SUPS LEFT JOIN ( -- 实际支出 SELECT PAY_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, SUM(ACCOUNT) AS PAY_REAL FROM GRP_PAY_APPLY A INNER JOIN grp_fin_type B ON A.GRP_FIN_TYPE=B.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM IN('ENQ_OP_MAIN','GRP_SER_SP') WHERE A.GRP_ID = @grp_id AND APPLY_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND APPLY_STATUS = 'VIS_FIN_END' GROUP BY PAY_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID ) B ON SUPS.SUP_ID = B.PAY_SUP_ID AND SUPS.COIN_ID = B.COIN_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN C ON SUPS.COIN_ID = C.COIN_ID ;

Set.CallName: 新建时获取默认车型和酒店类型

Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='JNY_CAT'
SELECT * FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='TRAFFIC'
SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'CAMP_CLASS' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

SELECT SER_KEY_ID, SER_KEY_NAME, SER_KEY_NAME_EN FROM SER_KEY A INNER JOIN SER_MAIN B ON A.SER_ID = B.SER_ID AND B.SER_TAG = 'SER_TAG_MEAL' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT b.SER_KEY_NAME KEY2 ,count(1) SER_NUM from ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a inner join ENQ_JNY ej on a.ENQ_JNY_ID = ej.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN SER_KEY b on a.SER_KEY0 = b.SER_KEY_ID inner join SER_MAIN c on b.SER_ID=c.SER_ID where ej.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID and c.SER_TAG = 'SER_TAG_MEAL' and b.SER_KEY_STATUS = 'USED' group by b.SER_KEY_NAME ) C ON A.SER_KEY_NAME = C.KEY2 WHERE a.SER_KEY_STATUS = 'USED' AND SUP_ID = @g_sup_id ORDER BY SER_NUM DESC,SER_KEY_ORD, SER_KEY_ID

Set.Name: 获取默认服务价格
Set.Sql: select sm.SER_NAME, sm.SER_ID, SER_KEY_ID, SER_KEY_NAME, al.SUP_ID, SER_PRICE, COIN_ID,COIN_KEY,CODE,city_id,city_id as country_id from SER_MAIN sm left join ( select E.SER_NAME, A.SER_ID, C.SER_KEY_ID, D.SER_KEY_NAME, A.SUP_ID, SER_PRICE, C.COIN_ID,F.COIN_KEY,C.CODE,c.city_id,b.city_id as country_id from ser_default a inner join city b on a.city_id=b.city_id left join ser_conn c on a.ser_id=c.ser_id and (c.city_id=a.city_id or a.city_id in (select country_id from city where city_id=@CITY_ID)) and a.sup_id=c.sup_id left join ser_key d on c.ser_key_id=d.ser_key_id LEFT JOIN SER_MAIN E ON A.SER_ID=E.SER_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN F ON C.COIN_ID=F.COIN_ID where A.OWN_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND ( A.SER_ID=5 AND C.CODE IN (select country_id from city where city_id=@CITY_ID) ) or ( A.SER_ID=1 AND C.CODE=cast(@F_ADD as varchar(5))+'_'+cast(@CITY_ID as varchar(5)) ) or ( A.SER_ID=2 AND c.ser_key_id=@HOTEL_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=4 AND c.ser_key_id=@MEAL_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=3 AND c.ser_key_id=@CAR_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=6 AND c.ser_key_id=@GUIDE_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=8 AND c.ser_key_id=@FEE_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=9 AND c.ser_key_id=@GLIVE_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=10 AND c.ser_key_id=@TRAIN_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) union select E.SER_NAME, A.SER_ID, C.SER_KEY_ID, D.SER_KEY_NAME, A.SUP_ID, SER_PRICE, C.COIN_ID,F.COIN_KEY,C.CODE,c.city_id,b.city_id as country_id from ser_default a inner join city b on a.city_id=b.city_id left join ser_conn c on a.ser_id=c.ser_id and (c.city_id=a.city_id or a.city_id in (select country_id from city WHERE city_id=@city_id)) and a.sup_id=c.sup_id left join ser_key d on c.ser_key_id=d.ser_key_id LEFT JOIN SER_MAIN E ON A.SER_ID=E.SER_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN F ON C.COIN_ID=F.COIN_ID inner join dbo.f_split(@SENIC_ID,',') as ss on col=c.ser_key_id WHERE A.OWN_SUP_ID=@g_sup_id and A.SER_ID=7 and a.city_id=@city_id ) as al on sm.ser_id=al.ser_id WHERE 1=1

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT a.SER_ID, a.SER_PID, replace(a.SER_SCALE, '@', '@@') AS SER_SCALE, CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG = 'enus' THEN a.SER_NAME_EN ELSE a.SER_NAME END SER_NAME, a.SER_TAG FROM SER_MAIN a INNER JOIN ser_conn b on a.ser_id = b.ser_id WHERE b.sup_id = @g_sup_id and b.ser_conn_id = @ser_conn_id ; -- ewa_table_name ser_tag SELECT SER_ID, SER_TAG, SER_TAG_ID, SER_TAG_NAME, SER_TAG_NAME_EN, SER_TAG_PARENT FROM ser_tag WHERE SER_TAG_STATUS = 'USED' AND ( SER_TAG_CITY_ID IN (@city_id, @COUNTRY_ID) OR SER_TAG_CITY_ID IS NULL ) ORDER BY SER_ID, SER_TAG, SER_TAG_ORD;

Set.Name: getProviders SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM v_ser_conn_detail WHERE SUPPLY_SUP_ID = @SUPPLY_SUP_ID AND ser_id = @ser_id AND purchaser_sup_id = @g_sup_id AND ser_conn_state = 'USED' AND SER_CONN_EDATE >= getdate() AND SER_CONN_SDATE <= getdate() AND city_id in (@city_id, @COUNTRY_ID) and ser_conn_ver='2026'

Set.Name: 获取默认服务价格
Set.Sql: select sm.SER_NAME, sm.SER_ID, SER_KEY_ID, SER_KEY_NAME, al.SUP_ID, SER_PRICE, COIN_ID,COIN_KEY,CODE,city_id,city_id as country_id from SER_MAIN sm left join ( select E.SER_NAME, A.SER_ID, C.SER_KEY_ID, D.SER_KEY_NAME, A.SUP_ID, SER_PRICE, C.COIN_ID,F.COIN_KEY,C.CODE,c.city_id,b.city_id as country_id from ser_default a inner join city b on a.city_id=b.city_id left join ser_conn c on a.ser_id=c.ser_id and (c.city_id=a.city_id or a.city_id in (select country_id from city where city_id=@CITY_ID)) and a.sup_id=c.sup_id left join ser_key d on c.ser_key_id=d.ser_key_id LEFT JOIN SER_MAIN E ON A.SER_ID=E.SER_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN F ON C.COIN_ID=F.COIN_ID where A.OWN_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND ( A.SER_ID=5 AND C.CODE IN (select country_id from city where city_id=@CITY_ID) ) or ( A.SER_ID=1 AND C.CODE=cast(@F_ADD as varchar(5))+'_'+cast(@CITY_ID as varchar(5)) ) or ( A.SER_ID=2 AND c.ser_key_id=@HOTEL_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=4 AND c.ser_key_id=@MEAL_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=3 AND c.ser_key_id=@CAR_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=6 AND c.ser_key_id=@GUIDE_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=8 AND c.ser_key_id=@FEE_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=9 AND c.ser_key_id=@GLIVE_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=10 AND c.ser_key_id=@TRAIN_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) union select E.SER_NAME, A.SER_ID, C.SER_KEY_ID, D.SER_KEY_NAME, A.SUP_ID, SER_PRICE, C.COIN_ID,F.COIN_KEY,C.CODE,c.city_id,b.city_id as country_id from ser_default a inner join city b on a.city_id=b.city_id left join ser_conn c on a.ser_id=c.ser_id and (c.city_id=a.city_id or a.city_id in (select country_id from city WHERE city_id=@city_id)) and a.sup_id=c.sup_id left join ser_key d on c.ser_key_id=d.ser_key_id LEFT JOIN SER_MAIN E ON A.SER_ID=E.SER_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN F ON C.COIN_ID=F.COIN_ID inner join dbo.f_split(@SENIC_ID,',') as ss on col=c.ser_key_id WHERE A.OWN_SUP_ID=@g_sup_id and A.SER_ID=7 and a.city_id=@city_id ) as al on sm.ser_id=al.ser_id WHERE 1=1

Set.Sql: select SM.SER_ID, sum(ISNULL(Sa.SER_PRICE,0))as SER_PRICE from (select * FROM SER_MAIN where ser_id=@ser_id )SM LEFT JOIN (select sc.ser_id,ser_price from SER_CONN SC inner join dbo.f_split(@senic_id,',') as ss on col=SC.ser_key_id LEFT JOIN SER_KEY SK ON SK.SER_KEY_ID=SC.SER_KEY_ID where SC.CITY_ID=@city_id AND sc.SUP_ID=@sup_id and sc.OWN_SUP_ID=@g_sup_id )as sa on sm.ser_id=sa.ser_id WHERE 1=1 group by SM.SER_ID

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT A.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID, a.SER_CONN_ID, a.SUB_NUM, v.SER_KEY_DES, v.CITY_NAME, v.SER_TAG, b.EDJ_PLACE_BEGIN, b.GUIDE1, b.EDJ_REMARK, b.EJD_TIME_BUCKET, b.EJD_TIME_BEGIN, b.EJD_TIME_SPAN, b.EJD_TRANSPORT_DISTANCE, ej.enq_jny_day, ej.enq_jny_date FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a INNER JOIN V_SER_CONN_DETAIL v ON a.SER_CONN_ID = v.SER_CONN_ID INNER join ENQ_JNY ej on a.enq_jny_id = ej.enq_jny_id LEFT JOIN enq_jny_day b ON a.ser_conn_id = b.ref_id AND b.ref_table = 'ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB.time' AND b.EJD_STATUS = 'USED' WHERE a.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID and v.ser_conn_ver = '2026' -- ewa_test @enq_jny_id is not null AND a.enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id -- ewa_test ORDER BY ej.enq_jny_date, b.EJD_TIME_BUCKET, b.EJD_TIME_BEGIN

Set.Name: UpdateImage Sql
Set.Sql:
UPDATE PIC_MAIN SET PIC_STATUS='WEB_NWS_DEL' WHERE REF_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND REF_TAG='ENQ_JNY' ;
INSERT INTO PIC_MAIN(REF_ID, REF_TAG, PIC_NAME, PIC_MEMO, PIC_TYPE , PIC_PATH, PIC_REAL_PATH, PIC_MD5, PIC_UNID, PIC_CDATE , PIC_LENGTH, PIC_ORD, ADM_ID, PIC_STATUS, SUP_ID,PIC_REF_ID ) select @ENQ_JNY_ID, 'ENQ_JNY', PIC_NAME, null, PIC_TYPE , PIC_PATH, PIC_REAL_PATH, PIC_MD5, @SYS_UNID, @SYS_DATE , PIC_LENGTH, 1, @G_ADM_ID, 'WEB_NWS_DLV', @G_SUP_ID,PIC_ID from PIC_MAIN where PIC_ID=@PIC_ID ;

Set.Name: deleteImage Sql
Set.Sql: UPDATE PIC_MAIN SET PIC_STATUS='WEB_NWS_DEL' WHERE REF_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND REF_TAG='ENQ_JNY' and sup_id=@g_sup_id

Set.Name: setImageAsCover sql
Set.Sql: UPDATE GRP_GYAP_DOC SET TITLE_IMG = ( SELECT TOP 1 @EWA.PATH_UPLOAD_URL + PIC_PATH FROM PIC_MAIN WHERE REF_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND REF_TAG='ENQ_JNY' AND PIC_STATUS = 'WEB_NWS_DLV' ORDER BY PIC_ID DESC ) WHERE SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND GRP_GYAP_STATE='USED' AND GRP_ID in (select GRP_ID from enq_main where enq_id=@enq_id)

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT A.*, @EWA.PATH_UPLOAD_URL + B.PIC_PATH + '$resized/320x240.jpg' AS ENQ_PIC, em.HEAD_NUM + em.PEOPLE_NUM AS NUMS, em.FLOW_STATE, case when A.sup_id = @g_sup_id then 'SELF' -- 路嘉 when dj.sup_id > 0 then 'GROUND' -- 地接分公司 when suply.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DATE is not null then 'SUPPLY' -- 供应商 else 'UNKNOW' -- 不可能 END AS OP_TYPE FROM ENQ_JNY A LEFT JOIN PIC_MAIN B ON B.REF_ID = A.ENQ_JNY_ID AND B.REF_TAG = 'ENQ_JNY' AND B.PIC_STATUS = 'WEB_NWS_DLV' -- 2024-09-18 王总 地接系统可以直接参与到修改总部的行程信息 LEFT JOIN ADM_USER_GRP_SUB dj ON a.sup_id = dj.SUP_ID AND dj.SUB_ADM_ID = @g_adm_id AND dj.SUB_SUP_ID = @g_sup_id INNER JOIN enq_main em ON a.enq_id = em.enq_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT b.enq_op_id, b.ENQ_ID , FRO_ENQ_JNY_DATE FROM enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.ENQ_OP_ID = b.ENQ_OP_ID WHERE SUP_DOWN_ID = @g_sup_id ) suply on a.enq_jny_date = suply.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DATE and a.ENQ_ID = suply.ENQ_ID WHERE A.ENQ_JNY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND A.enq_id = @enq_id AND ( A.sup_id = @g_sup_id OR dj.sup_id > 0 OR suply.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DATE is not null ); SELECT head_num, people_num, head_num + people_num as nums FROM enq_main WHERE enq_id = @enq_id; -- 关联营地的成本团 2024-09-24 SELECT camp_id AS cost_camp_id, CO_STUDENT, CO_CS, CO_CS_MEDIA, CO_CS_MEDICAL, CO_FOREIGN_TEACHER, CO_CHINES_TEACHAR FROM camp_open co WHERE co.co_cost_grp_id = @grp_id;
-- 营地关联的 ser_key0 SELECT ser_key_id AS camp0_key_id FROM ser_key WHERE SER_KEY_REF_BASE = 'CAMP_MAIN' AND REF_ID = @cost_camp_id AND SER_KEY_STATUS = 'USED' AND SER_ID = 11 AND ser_key_grp = 'CAMP0';

Set.Name: 新建时获取默认车型和酒店类型
获取服务列表
获取服务列表-ENQ_OP_ID
获取已存在的服务列表
Set.Sql: SELECT A.SER_ID, A.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID, A.ser_conn_id, B.SUP_ID AS sup_id, A.sup_down_id, a.sub_num, b.SER_KEY0, b.SER_KEY1, b.SER_KEY2, b.CITY_ID, a.enq_jny_price FROM enq_jny_ser_sub A LEFT JOIN SER_CONN B ON A.SER_CONN_ID = B.SER_CONN_ID WHERE a.enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id AND A.sup_id = @g_sup_id

Set.Name: 更新所有数据
json_获取线路说明
Set.Sql:
select top 1 enq_jny_content from enq_jny where f_add=@f_add and to_add=@to_add and ( to_add2 = @to_add2 or @to_add2 is null ) and len(enq_jny_content)>10 and sup_id=@g_sup_id
order by enq_jny_id desc

Set.Name: json_获取逻辑
Set.Sql: select SER_KEY_ID,SER_LGC_NUM0,SER_LGC_NUM1,SER_LGC_DY FROM SER_KEY_LOGIC WHERE SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND SER_LGC_NUM0<=@NUMS AND SER_LGC_NUM0>=@NUMS

Set.Name: 插入当天的缺省接待信息
Set.Sql: PR_ENQ_REC_DEFAULT(@GRP_ID,@ENQ_ID,@G_ADM_ID,@G_SUP_ID)

Set.Name: GetDayDes SQL
Set.Sql: --服务描述 SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID, EJD_TAG, EJD_TIME_BEGIN, EJD_TIME_END,EDJ_PLACE_BEGIN ,EDJ_PLACE_END,EDJ_REMARK,EJD_CITY_ID,SER_KEY0,SER_KEY1,SER_KEY2 ,A.DAY_NAME, B.REC_NAME,C.SER_ID FROM ENQ_JNY_DAY A LEFT JOIN REC_MAIN B ON A.GUIDE1=B.REC_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY C ON A.SER_KEY0=C.SER_KEY_ID WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND ENQ_JNY_DAY IN ( SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY FROM ENQ_JNY WHERE ENQ_JNY_ID=@ENQ_JNY_ID ) AND EJD_CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND EJD_TAG IS NOT NULL

Set.Name: GetEditSerConn SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 1 A.*,B.SUP_NAME FROM SER_CONN A INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN B ON A.SUP_ID=B.SUP_ID WHERE SER_ID=@SER_ID AND CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND own_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID and not SER_CONN_UPDATE_TIME is null and @tp=1 ORDER BY SER_CONN_UPDATE_TIME DESC ) AA UNION SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 1 A.*,B.SUP_NAME FROM SER_CONN A INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN B ON A.SUP_ID=B.SUP_ID WHERE SER_ID=@SER_ID AND CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND own_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID and @tp=0 ORDER BY SER_CONN_ID DESC ) BB

Set.Name: saveinfo
Set.Sql: UPDATE enq_jny SET enq_jny_day = @enq_jny_day , enq_jny_date = @enq_jny_date , traffic = @traffic , air_no = @air_no , air_time = @air_time , enq_jny_content = @enq_jny_content , ENQ_JNY_CONTENT_EN=@ENQ_JNY_CONTENT_EN , MEAL_ID=@MEAL_ID WHERE enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id and sup_id = @g_sup_id

Set.Name: 保存营地上课信息 sql
检查营地状况 sql
Set.Sql: SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY, CAMP_CLASS_TAG FROM ENQ_JNY WHERE ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID AND SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND NOT (CAMP_CLASS_TAG ='' OR CAMP_CLASS_TAG IS NULL) ORDER BY ENQ_JNY_DAY

Set.Name: 订单信息
Set.Sql:
-- 订单信息 SELECT a.ENQ_OP_ID, C.SELECT_STATE, C.FLOW_STATE, B.ENQ_JNY_DAY, A.SER_KEY0, A.SER_KEY1, A.SER_KEY2, A.SER_CITY_ID, A.SUB_NUM AS SUB_NUM_SUP, a.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP, a.ENQ_JNY_PRICE, a.COIN_ID_SUP, D.SUP_NAME, D.SUP_ID, A.EOMS_FREE -- 免额（2025-07） FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB A INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY B ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID = B.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN C ON C.ENQ_OP_ID = A.ENQ_OP_ID INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN D ON C.SUP_ID = D.SUP_ID WHERE C.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID AND ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED' ORDER BY C.SELECT_STATE DESC, D.SUP_NAME;
SELECT SUPS.*, B.PAY_REAL, C.COIN_NAME, C.COIN_KEY FROM ( -- 所有供应商和货币 SELECT GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, RELATE_SUP_ID AS SUP_ID, COIN_ID, SUM(COS_PRICE) AS PAY_PLAN FROM grp_fin_type WHERE grp_id = @grp_id AND fin_type = '0' AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM IN ('ENQ_OP_MAIN', 'GRP_SER_SP') AND sup_id = @G_SUP_ID GROUP BY GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID ) SUPS LEFT JOIN ( -- 实际支出 SELECT PAY_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, SUM(ACCOUNT) AS PAY_REAL FROM GRP_PAY_APPLY A INNER JOIN grp_fin_type B ON A.GRP_FIN_TYPE = B.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM IN ('ENQ_OP_MAIN', 'GRP_SER_SP') WHERE A.GRP_ID = @grp_id AND APPLY_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND APPLY_STATUS = 'VIS_FIN_END' GROUP BY PAY_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID ) B ON SUPS.SUP_ID = B.PAY_SUP_ID AND SUPS.COIN_ID = B.COIN_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN C ON SUPS.COIN_ID = C.COIN_ID;

Set.Name: GetModifiedLogs
Set.Sql: SELECT isnull(a.ser_city_id, a.new_ser_city_id) ser_city_id, b.enq_jny_day, isnull(a.ser_id, a.new_ser_id) ser_id, count(*) AS changes FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_LOG a INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY b ON a.ENQ_JNY_ID = b.ENQ_JNY_ID -- 筛选出所有第X天的变化 INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY c ON b.enq_jny_day = c.enq_jny_day AND c.enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id WHERE b.grp_id = @grp_id GROUP BY isnull(a.ser_city_id, a.new_ser_city_id), b.enq_jny_day, isnull(a.ser_id, a.new_ser_id)

Set.Name: getser
Set.Sql: -- EWA_SQL_SPLIT_NO select dbo.f_stradd(@GRP_JNY_ID,1) as strser,dbo.f_stradd(@GRP_JNY_ID,2) as strser2,dbo.f_stradd(@GRP_JNY_ID,3) as strser3 from adm_user where adm_id=@g_adm_id

Set.Name: getnull
Set.Sql: -- EWA_SQL_SPLIT_NO select '' as strser,'' as strser2,'' as strser3 from adm_user where adm_id=@g_adm_id

Set.Name: getser2
Set.Sql: -- EWA_SQL_SPLIT_NO select dbo.f_stradd2(@JNY_MDL_CONN_ID,1) as strser,dbo.f_stradd2(@JNY_MDL_CONN_ID,2) as strser2,dbo.f_stradd2(@JNY_MDL_CONN_ID,3) as strser3 from adm_user adm_id=@g_adm_id

Set.Name: getser3
Set.Sql: -- EWA_SQL_SPLIT_NO select dbo.f_stradd3(@ENQ_JNY_ID,1) as strser,dbo.f_stradd3(@ENQ_JNY_ID,2) as strser2,dbo.f_stradd3(@ENQ_JNY_ID,3) as strser3 from adm_user where adm_id=@g_adm_id

Set.Name: 获取默认服务价格
Set.Sql: select sm.SER_NAME, sm.SER_ID, SER_KEY_ID, SER_KEY_NAME, al.SUP_ID, SER_PRICE, COIN_ID,COIN_KEY,CODE,city_id,city_id as country_id from SER_MAIN sm left join ( select E.SER_NAME, A.SER_ID, C.SER_KEY_ID, D.SER_KEY_NAME, A.SUP_ID, SER_PRICE, C.COIN_ID,F.COIN_KEY,C.CODE,c.city_id,b.city_id as country_id from ser_default a inner join city b on a.city_id=b.city_id left join ser_conn c on a.ser_id=c.ser_id and (c.city_id=a.city_id or a.city_id in (select country_id from city where city_id=@CITY_ID)) and a.sup_id=c.sup_id left join ser_key d on c.ser_key_id=d.ser_key_id LEFT JOIN SER_MAIN E ON A.SER_ID=E.SER_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN F ON C.COIN_ID=F.COIN_ID where A.OWN_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND ( A.SER_ID=5 AND C.CODE IN (select country_id from city where city_id=@CITY_ID) ) or ( A.SER_ID=1 AND C.CODE=cast(@F_ADD as varchar(5))+'_'+cast(@CITY_ID as varchar(5)) ) or ( A.SER_ID=2 AND c.ser_key_id=@HOTEL_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=4 AND c.ser_key_id=@MEAL_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=3 AND c.ser_key_id=@CAR_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=6 AND c.ser_key_id=@GUIDE_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=8 AND c.ser_key_id=@FEE_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=9 AND c.ser_key_id=@GLIVE_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) or ( A.SER_ID=10 AND c.ser_key_id=@TRAIN_ID and a.city_id=@CITY_ID ) union select E.SER_NAME, A.SER_ID, C.SER_KEY_ID, D.SER_KEY_NAME, A.SUP_ID, SER_PRICE, C.COIN_ID,F.COIN_KEY,C.CODE,c.city_id,b.city_id as country_id from ser_default a inner join city b on a.city_id=b.city_id left join ser_conn c on a.ser_id=c.ser_id and (c.city_id=a.city_id or a.city_id in (select country_id from city WHERE city_id=@city_id)) and a.sup_id=c.sup_id left join ser_key d on c.ser_key_id=d.ser_key_id LEFT JOIN SER_MAIN E ON A.SER_ID=E.SER_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN F ON C.COIN_ID=F.COIN_ID inner join dbo.f_split(@SENIC_ID,',') as ss on col=c.ser_key_id WHERE A.OWN_SUP_ID=@g_sup_id and A.SER_ID=7 and a.city_id=@city_id ) as al on sm.ser_id=al.ser_id WHERE 1=1

Set.Name: 获取该供应商机票价格
Set.Sql: select SM.SER_ID,ISNULL(SC.COIN_ID,1),ISNULL(SC.SER_PRICE,0)as SER_PRICE FROM SER_MAIN SM LEFT JOIN SER_CONN SC ON SM.SER_ID=SC.SER_ID and sc.SUP_ID=@sup_id and code=cast(@F_ADD as varchar(10))+'_'+cast(@CITY_ID as varchar(10)) WHERE SM.SER_ID=@SER_ID

Set.Name: 获取该供应商签证价格
Set.Sql: select SM.SER_ID,ISNULL(SC.COIN_ID,1),ISNULL(SC.SER_PRICE,0)as SER_PRICE FROM SER_MAIN SM LEFT JOIN SER_CONN SC ON SM.SER_ID=SC.SER_ID and sc.SUP_ID=@sup_id and code=cast((select top 1 country_id from city where city_id=@city_id) as varchar(10)) WHERE SM.SER_ID=@SER_ID

Set.Name: 获取该供应商酒店价格
Set.Sql: select SM.SER_ID,ISNULL(SC.COIN_ID,1),ISNULL(SC.SER_PRICE,0)as SER_PRICE FROM SER_MAIN SM LEFT JOIN SER_CONN SC ON SM.SER_ID=SC.SER_ID AND SC.CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND sc.SUP_ID=@sup_id AND SC.SER_KEY_ID=@hotel_id LEFT JOIN SER_KEY SK ON SK.SER_KEY_ID=SC.SER_KEY_ID WHERE SM.SER_ID =@SER_ID

Set.Name: 获取该供应商餐饮价格
Set.Sql: select SM.SER_ID,ISNULL(SC.COIN_ID,1),ISNULL(SC.SER_PRICE,0)as SER_PRICE FROM SER_MAIN SM LEFT JOIN SER_CONN SC ON SM.SER_ID=SC.SER_ID AND SC.CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND sc.SUP_ID=@sup_id AND SC.SER_KEY_ID=@meal_id LEFT JOIN SER_KEY SK ON SK.SER_KEY_ID=SC.SER_KEY_ID WHERE SM.SER_ID =@SER_ID

Set.Name: 获取该供应商租车价格
Set.Sql: select SM.SER_ID,ISNULL(SC.COIN_ID,1),ISNULL(SC.SER_PRICE,0)as SER_PRICE FROM SER_MAIN SM LEFT JOIN SER_CONN SC ON SM.SER_ID=SC.SER_ID AND SC.CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND sc.SUP_ID=@sup_id AND SC.SER_KEY_ID=@car_id LEFT JOIN SER_KEY SK ON SK.SER_KEY_ID=SC.SER_KEY_ID WHERE SM.SER_ID =@SER_ID

Set.Name: 获取该供应商导游价格
Set.Sql: select SM.SER_ID,ISNULL(SC.COIN_ID,1),ISNULL(SC.SER_PRICE,0)as SER_PRICE FROM SER_MAIN SM LEFT JOIN SER_CONN SC ON SM.SER_ID=SC.SER_ID AND SC.CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND sc.SUP_ID=@sup_id AND SC.SER_KEY_ID=@guide_id LEFT JOIN SER_KEY SK ON SK.SER_KEY_ID=SC.SER_KEY_ID WHERE SM.SER_ID =@SER_ID

Set.Name: 获取该供应商小费价格
Set.Sql: select SM.SER_ID,ISNULL(SC.COIN_ID,1),ISNULL(SC.SER_PRICE,0)as SER_PRICE FROM SER_MAIN SM LEFT JOIN SER_CONN SC ON SM.SER_ID=SC.SER_ID AND SC.CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND sc.SUP_ID=@sup_id AND SC.SER_KEY_ID=@fee_id LEFT JOIN SER_KEY SK ON SK.SER_KEY_ID=SC.SER_KEY_ID WHERE SM.SER_ID =@SER_ID

Set.Name: 获取该供应商导游住宿价格
Set.Sql: select SM.SER_ID,ISNULL(SC.COIN_ID,1),ISNULL(SC.SER_PRICE,0)as SER_PRICE FROM SER_MAIN SM LEFT JOIN SER_CONN SC ON SM.SER_ID=SC.SER_ID AND SC.CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND sc.SUP_ID=@sup_id AND SC.SER_KEY_ID=@glive_id LEFT JOIN SER_KEY SK ON SK.SER_KEY_ID=SC.SER_KEY_ID WHERE SM.SER_ID =@SER_ID

Set.Name: 获取该供应商培训价格
Set.Sql: select SM.SER_ID,ISNULL(SC.COIN_ID,1),ISNULL(SC.SER_PRICE,0)as SER_PRICE FROM SER_MAIN SM LEFT JOIN SER_CONN SC ON SM.SER_ID=SC.SER_ID AND SC.CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND sc.SUP_ID=@sup_id AND SC.SER_KEY_ID=@train_id LEFT JOIN SER_KEY SK ON SK.SER_KEY_ID=SC.SER_KEY_ID WHERE SM.SER_ID =@SER_ID

Set.Name: 获取该供应商其他价格
Set.Sql: select SM.SER_ID,ISNULL(SC.COIN_ID,1),ISNULL(SC.SER_PRICE,0)as SER_PRICE FROM SER_MAIN SM LEFT JOIN SER_CONN SC ON SM.SER_ID=SC.SER_ID AND SC.CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND sc.SUP_ID=@sup_id LEFT JOIN SER_KEY SK ON SK.SER_KEY_ID=SC.SER_KEY_ID WHERE SM.SER_ID =@SER_ID

Set.Name: 获取该供应商景点价格
Set.Sql: select SM.SER_ID, sum(ISNULL(Sa.SER_PRICE,0))as SER_PRICE from (select * FROM SER_MAIN where ser_id=@ser_id )SM LEFT JOIN (select sc.ser_id,ser_price from SER_CONN SC inner join dbo.f_split(@senic_id,',') as ss on col=SC.ser_key_id LEFT JOIN SER_KEY SK ON SK.SER_KEY_ID=SC.SER_KEY_ID where SC.CITY_ID=@city_id AND sc.SUP_ID=@sup_id and sc.OWN_SUP_ID=@g_sup_id )as sa on sm.ser_id=sa.ser_id WHERE 1=1 group by SM.SER_ID

Set.Bottom:
第一步，点击打开携程

第二步，查询航班，单程/往返/多程，到订单页面

第三步，打开浏览器“检查”窗口

第四步，粘贴代码 点击复制代码，按回车。

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
-- ewa_table_name flightsInfo SELECT A.* FROM GRP_AIR_SUB A INNER JOIN enq_jny_ser_sub b ON b.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID = a.GRP_AIR_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID INNER JOIN enq_jny c ON b.enq_jny_id = c.enq_jny_id WHERE c.enq_ID = @enq_ID AND c.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID;
SELECT sum(GRP_AM_UNIT) AS GRP_AM_UNIT FROM GRP_AIR_main WHERE grp_am_id IN ( SELECT grp_am_id FROM GRP_AIR_SUB A INNER JOIN enq_jny_ser_sub b ON b.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID = a.GRP_AIR_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID INNER JOIN enq_jny c ON b.enq_jny_id = c.enq_jny_id WHERE c.enq_ID = @enq_ID AND c.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID )

Set.Name: OnNew SQL
Set.Sql: INSERT INTO GRP_AIR_SUB (GRP_AM_ID, GRP_ID, GRP_AIR_DATE, GRP_AIR_CODE, GRP_AIR_LVL, GRP_AIR_TIME, GRP_AIR_NUM, GRP_AR_SIN, GRP_AR_TAX, GRP_AR_CODE, GRP_AR_TIME, GRP_AR_COMP, GRP_AR_TYPE, GRP_AR_MID, GRP_AR_FA, GRP_AR_TA, SUP_ID, ADM_ID, SUP_DOWN_ID, ENQ_JNY_DAY, GRP_AR_TAG) VALUES ( @GRP_AM_ID, @GRP_ID, @SYS_DATE, @GRP_AIR_CODE, @GRP_AIR_LVL, @GRP_AIR_TIME, @GRP_AIR_NUM, @GRP_AR_SIN, @GRP_AR_TAX, @GRP_AR_CODE, @GRP_AR_TIME, @GRP_AR_COMP, @GRP_AR_TYPE, @GRP_AR_MID, @GRP_AR_FA, @GRP_AR_TA, @G_SUP_ID, @G_ADM_ID, @SUP_DOWN_ID, @ENQ_JNY_DAY, @GRP_AR_TAG)

Set.Name: OnModify SQL
Set.Sql: UPDATE GRP_AIR_SUB SET GRP_AM_ID = @GRP_AM_ID, GRP_ID = @GRP_ID, GRP_AIR_DATE = @SYS_DATE, GRP_AIR_CODE = @GRP_AIR_CODE, GRP_AIR_LVL = @GRP_AIR_LVL, GRP_AIR_TIME = @GRP_AIR_TIME, GRP_AIR_NUM = @GRP_AIR_NUM, GRP_AR_SIN = @GRP_AR_SIN, GRP_AR_TAX = @GRP_AR_TAX, GRP_AR_CODE = @GRP_AR_CODE, GRP_AR_TIME = @GRP_AR_TIME, GRP_AR_COMP = @GRP_AR_COMP, GRP_AR_TYPE = @GRP_AR_TYPE, GRP_AR_MID = @GRP_AR_MID, GRP_AR_FA = @GRP_AR_FA, GRP_AR_TA = @GRP_AR_TA, SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID, ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID, SUP_DOWN_ID = @SUP_DOWN_ID, ENQ_JNY_DAY = @ENQ_JNY_DAY, GRP_AR_TAG = @GRP_AR_TAG WHERE GRP_AIR_ID = @GRP_AIR_ID AND SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID

Set.Sql: SELECT A.* , depture.CITY_COU_NAME as depture_city_name , arrival.CITY_COU_NAME as arrival_city_name , st.ser_tag_name , bac.bac_name FROM GRP_AIR_SUB A inner join GRP_AIR_MAIN m on a.grp_am_id = m.grp_am_id left join v_city depture on a.GRP_AIR_CITY_ID = depture.CITY_ID left join v_city arrival on a.GRP_AR_CITY_ID = arrival.CITY_ID left join ser_tag st on a.GRP_AIR_LVL = st.ser_tag_id left join bas_air_company bac on left(a.GRP_AIR_CODE,2) = bac.bac_iata_code WHERE a.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID -- ewa_test @EWA_RECYCLE is null AND A.GRP_AIR_STATUS = 'USED' -- ewa_test @EWA_RECYCLE = '1' AND A.GRP_AIR_STATUS = 'DEL' -- ewa_test @SELECTED_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID is not null AND m.grp_am_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID = @SELECTED_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID -- ewa_test @grp_am_id is not null and m.grp_am_id = @grp_am_id -- ewa_test ORDER BY A.GRP_AIR_ID DESC

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
-- EWA_SQL_SPLIT_NO SELECT FLOW_STATE FROM ENQ_MAIN a INNER JOIN grp_main gm ON a.grp_id = gm.grp_id WHERE a.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID AND gm.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' -- 散拼可以改，要改航班和日期，2025-01-22，吕国芳 ;
WITH BUDGET AS ( -- 预算 SELECT ENQ_JNY_ID EJ, SUM(A * ISNULL(C.GRP_POINT, 1)) BUDGET FROM ( SELECT C.GRP_ID, C.ENQ_ID, A.ENQ_JNY_ID, COIN_ID, SUM(ENQ_JNY_PRICE * SUB_NUM) A FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB A INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY B ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID = B.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_MAIN C ON B.ENQ_ID = C.ENQ_ID WHERE C.GRP_ID > 0 AND C.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND C.ENQ_STATE = 'USED' AND ( C.enq_id = @enq_id OR ( ( @enq_id = '' OR @enq_id IS NULL ) AND C.enq_select_state = 'CHECKED_TRUE' AND C.GRP_ID = @GRP_ID AND C.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID ) ) GROUP BY C.GRP_ID, C.ENQ_ID, A.ENQ_JNY_ID, COIN_ID ) A INNER JOIN GRP_MAIN B ON A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN GRP_COIN C ON C.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND B.GRP_COIN = C.COIN_TO AND A.COIN_ID = C.COIN_FROM GROUP BY ENQ_JNY_ID ) SELECT e1.*, @EWA.PATH_UPLOAD_URL + PM.PIC_PATH + '$resized/320x240.jpg' AS ENQ_PIC, BUDGET.BUDGET, CONVERT(VARCHAR, e1.ENQ_JNY_DATE, 112) DT -- 用于营地课程关联 FROM ENQ_JNY e1 LEFT JOIN PIC_MAIN PM ON PM.REF_ID = E1.ENQ_jny_ID AND PM.REF_TAG = 'ENQ_JNY' AND PM.PIC_STATUS = 'WEB_NWS_DLV' INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT SD_DATA FROM share_data WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' AND GRP_ID = @GRP_ID ) share_data ON share_data.SD_DATA = @G_SUP_ID LEFT JOIN BUDGET ON E1.ENQ_JNY_ID = BUDGET.EJ WHERE e1.enq_id = @enq_id ORDER BY e1.ENQ_JNY_DAY

GetState Sql

Set.Name: UpdateImage Sql
Set.Sql:
UPDATE PIC_MAIN SET PIC_STATUS='WEB_NWS_DEL' WHERE REF_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND REF_TAG='ENQ_JNY' ;
INSERT INTO PIC_MAIN(REF_ID, REF_TAG, PIC_NAME, PIC_MEMO, PIC_TYPE , PIC_PATH, PIC_REAL_PATH, PIC_MD5, PIC_UNID, PIC_CDATE , PIC_LENGTH, PIC_ORD, ADM_ID, PIC_STATUS, SUP_ID,PIC_REF_ID ) select @ENQ_JNY_ID, 'ENQ_JNY', PIC_NAME, null, PIC_TYPE , PIC_PATH, PIC_REAL_PATH, PIC_MD5, @SYS_UNID, @SYS_DATE , PIC_LENGTH, 1, @G_ADM_ID, 'WEB_NWS_DLV', @G_SUP_ID,PIC_ID from PIC_MAIN where PIC_ID=@PIC_ID ;

Set.Name: deleteImage Sql
Set.Sql: UPDATE PIC_MAIN SET PIC_STATUS='WEB_NWS_DEL' WHERE REF_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND REF_TAG='ENQ_JNY' and sup_id=@g_sup_id

Set.Name: setImageAsCover sql
Set.Sql: UPDATE GRP_GYAP_DOC SET TITLE_IMG = ( SELECT TOP 1 @EWA.PATH_UPLOAD_URL + PIC_PATH FROM PIC_MAIN WHERE REF_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND REF_TAG='ENQ_JNY' AND PIC_STATUS = 'WEB_NWS_DLV' ORDER BY PIC_ID DESC ) WHERE SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND GRP_GYAP_STATE='USED' AND GRP_ID in (select GRP_ID from enq_main where enq_id=@enq_id)

upContentEn

Set.Sql: SELECT A.* FROM ENQ_JNY_DAY A INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT SD_DATA FROM share_data WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' AND GRP_ID = @GRP_ID ) share_data ON share_data.SD_DATA = @G_SUP_ID LEFT JOIN bas_tag bt ON a.EJD_TIME_BUCKET = bt.bas_tag LEFT JOIN bas_tag bt2 ON a.EJD_SER_TAG_DES = bt2.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN ser_main sm ON sm.SUP_ID = 3 AND sm.SER_TAG = CASE WHEN isnull(bt2.BAS_TAG_PARA1, '') != '' THEN bt2.BAS_TAG_PARA1 ELSE bt.BAS_TAG_PARA3 END WHERE a.REF_TABLE = 'CUSTOM-TIME-SCHEDULE' AND A.EJD_STATUS = CASE WHEN @EWA_RECYCLE = '1' THEN 'DEL' ELSE 'USED' END AND A.ENQ_JNY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID and isnull(a.EJD_TIME_BUCKET,'') !='ENQ_TIME_UNDEFINED' ORDER BY len(EJD_TIME_BEGIN), -- 将 12:31+1 排序到后面 EJD_TIME_BEGIN, EJD_TIME_END;

Set.Name: UAct0 SQL
Set.Sql:
delete FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_FLIGHT WHERE EA_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID = -1 and EA_TMP_ID = @JSESSIONID and A_ID in ( select col from ewa_split (@aids, ',') a ) ; WITH paras AS ( SELECT a.col AS ea_id, b.col AS EA_ENQ_JNY_ID, c.col AS a_id FROM ewa_split (@eaIds, ',') a INNER JOIN ewa_split (@eaEnqJnyIds, ',') b ON a.idx = b.idx INNER JOIN ewa_split (@aids, ',') c ON c.idx = a.idx ) INSERT INTO ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_FLIGHT ( EA_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID, A_ID, A_D_CITY_ID, A_A_CITY_ID, A_CODE, A_IATA, A_D_TIME, A_A_TIME, A_D_AIRPORT, A_A_AIRPORT, A_D_AIRPORT_ID, A_A_AIRPORT_ID, A_TRANSFOR, A_PLANE, A_TIME, A_EAT, A_REF, A_DISTANCE, A_DESCRIPTION, A_CDATE, A_STATUS, SUP_ID, ADM_ID, A_SER_CONN_ID, A_BEGIN, A_END, EA_ENQ_JNY_DATE, EA_ENQ_JNY_ID, EA_ENQ_ID, EA_GRP_ID, EA_TMP_ID ) SELECT -1, a.A_ID, a.A_D_CITY_ID, a.A_A_CITY_ID, a.A_CODE, a.A_IATA, a.A_D_TIME, a.A_A_TIME, a.A_D_AIRPORT, a.A_A_AIRPORT, a.A_D_AIRPORT_ID, a.A_A_AIRPORT_ID, a.A_TRANSFOR, a.A_PLANE, a.A_TIME, a.A_EAT, a.A_REF, a.A_DISTANCE, a.A_DESCRIPTION, @sys_date, 'USED', @G_SUP_ID, @G_ADM_ID, a.A_SER_CONN_ID, a.A_BEGIN, a.A_END, c.ENQ_JNY_DATE, b.EA_ENQ_JNY_ID, @ENQ_ID, c.GRP_ID, @JSESSIONID FROM SER_CONN_FLIGHT a INNER JOIN paras b ON a.a_id = b.a_id AND ea_id = -1 INNER JOIN enq_jny c ON b.EA_ENQ_JNY_ID = c.enq_jny_id AND c.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID WHERE a.A_STATUS = 'USED' select 1 a;
-- ewa_test @update_enq_jny_ser_sub_id is not null -- 用于创建机票团时触发 UPDATE ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_FLIGHT SET EA_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID = a.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a WHERE ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_FLIGHT.EA_ENQ_ID = @enq_id AND a.ser_id = 1 AND ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_FLIGHT.A_SER_CONN_ID = a.ser_conn_id AND ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_FLIGHT.EA_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID = -1 -- ewa_test

SELECT ENQ_JNY_ID, 'D' + convert(varchar, ENQ_JNY_DAY) + ' ' + convert(varchar, enq_jny_date, 111) + ' ' +isnull(dbo.f_stradd_citys (ENQ_JNY_ID, @ewa_lang), '') AS DES, enq_jny_date, f_add, to_add, to_add2, city_id FROM ENQ_JNY WHERE enq_id = @enq_id and TRAFFIC ='AIR' -- 过滤需要机票 ORDER BY ENQ_JNY_DAY

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: WITH enq_op_main_checked AS ( SELECT B.*, bb.ENQ_OP_STATE, bb.SELECT_STATE, BB.PIC_MD5, sp.sup_name AS ENQ_OP_SUP_NAME FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB B INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN bb ON b.ENQ_OP_ID = bb.ENQ_OP_ID INNER JOIN enq_main cc ON bb.enq_id = cc.enq_id AND BB.ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED' AND BB.SELECT_STATE = 'CHECKED_TRUE' AND bb.enq_id = @enq_id LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN SP ON B.SUP_DOWN_ID = SP.SUP_ID -- ewa_test @ENQ_OP_ID is not NULL and bb.ENQ_OP_ID = @up_enq_op_id -- ewa_test ), w_ser_country as ( SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY_ID ,SER_ID FROM CITY c ,SER_MAIN sm WHERE CITY_ID IN (@CITYS_SPLIT) and sm.SER_SCOPE_LVL = 'COUNTRY' ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.COIN_ID, c.ENQ_JNY_DATE, a.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID, a.SUB_NUM, a.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_TMP_RID, a.SER_CITY_ID CITY_ID, CASE WHEN SER_TAG = 'SER_TAG_AIR' THEN sc.SER_KEY_REMARK0 ELSE sc.SER_KEY_DES END N0, g.CITY_NAME, f.SER_KEY_REMARK, A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE PRICE, Sc.SER_NAME, A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE * a.SUB_NUM TOTAL, b.SELECT_STATE, B.ENQ_OP_ID, b.COIN_ID COIN_SUP, ISNULL(B.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP, B.ENQ_JNY_PRICE) ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP, B.SUB_NUM SUB_NUM_SUP, ISNULL(B.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP, B.ENQ_JNY_PRICE) * B.SUB_NUM AS TOTAL_SUP, ( ISNULL(B.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP, B.ENQ_JNY_PRICE) * B.SUB_NUM - A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE * a.SUB_NUM ) AS DIFF, sc.SUPPLY_SUP_NAME AS SUP_NAME, B.PIC_MD5, a.ser_conn_id, a.ser_id, a.SER_KEY0, a.SER_KEY1, a.SER_KEY2, a.SER_CITY_ID, sc.SUPPLY_SUP_ID AS SUP_ID FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a INNER JOIN v_ser_conn_detail sc ON a.ser_conn_id = sc.ser_conn_id AND sc.ser_conn_ver IS NULL INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY c ON a.ENQ_JNY_ID = c.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN SER_KEY f ON a.SER_KEY0 = f.SER_KEY_ID INNER JOIN CITY g ON a.SER_CITY_ID = g.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN enq_op_main_checked b ON a.ENQ_JNY_ID = b.ENQ_JNY_ID AND a.SER_CITY_ID = b.SER_CITY_ID AND a.SER_KEY0 = b.SER_KEY0 AND a.SER_KEY1 = b.SER_KEY1 AND a.SER_KEY2 = b.SER_KEY2 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT SD_DATA FROM share_data WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' AND GRP_ID = @GRP_ID ) share_data ON share_data.SD_DATA = @G_SUP_ID WHERE c.enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id AND (a.SER_CITY_ID IN (@CITYS_SPLIT) or exists(select 1 from w_ser_country x where a.SER_CITY_ID=x.COUNTRY_ID and a.SER_ID=x.SER_ID) ) ) aaa WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY ENQ_JNY_DATE, ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID

Set.Sql:
SELECT top 1 case when gm.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' then '已成团不能修改' else '审批流程已到等待客户确认，不能修改' end EWA_ERR_OUT FROM ENQ_MAIN em INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY ej ON ej.ENQ_ID = em.ENQ_ID INNER JOIN GRP_MAIN gm ON em.GRP_ID = gm.GRP_ID WHERE (em.FLOW_STATE IN ('ENQ_END', 'ENQ_CONTRACT_VALID','ENQ_CUS_YES') or gm.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') and ej.ENQ_JNY_ID in (select ENQ_JNY_ID from ENQ_JNY_DAY where ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID) -- AND gm.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' -- 散拼可以改，要改航班和日期，2025-01-22，吕国芳 ;
UPDATE ENQ_JNY_DAY SET EJD_TIME_BUCKET = @EJD_TIME_BUCKET, EJD_TIME_BEGIN = @EJD_TIME_BEGIN, EJD_TIME_END = @EJD_TIME_END, EDJ_PLACE_BEGIN = @EDJ_PLACE_BEGIN, EDJ_PLACE_END = @EDJ_PLACE_END, EDJ_REMARK = @EDJ_REMARK, ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID, EJD_CITY_ID = @CITY_ID, SER_KEY0 = @SER_KEY0, SER_KEY1 = @SER_KEY1, SER_KEY2 = @SER_KEY2, GUIDES = @GUIDES, EJD_MDATE = @SYS_DATE, EDJ_PLACE_BEGIN_EN = @EDJ_PLACE_BEGIN_EN, EDJ_PLACE_END_EN = @EDJ_PLACE_END_EN, EDJ_AIRLINES = @EDJ_AIRLINES, GUIDES_EN = @GUIDES_EN, EDJ_REMARK_EN = @EDJ_REMARK_EN, EJD_TIME_SPAN = @EJD_TIME_SPAN, EJD_TRANSPORT_DISTANCE = @EJD_TRANSPORT_DISTANCE, EDJ_DESC = @EDJ_DESC, EDJ_DESC_EN = @EDJ_DESC_EN, ser_id = @ser_id, EJD_SER_TAG_DES = @EJD_SER_TAG_DES, EJD_STATUS = 'USED' WHERE ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID AND SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID

• 复制过程中，将会完全删除目标日期的相同服务， 例如如果选择中包含“营地服务”，则复制到的日期会将所有“营地服务”删除，并替换成当前选择的服务。
  • 目标日期的行程中应该包含来源日期的城市。
  • 同时替换目标服务关联的时程信息

Set.SearchSql: SELECT ENQ_JNY_ID, ENQ_JNY_DAY FROM ENQ_JNY WHERE SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID ORDER BY ENQ_JNY_DAY

Set.Sql: SELECT ENQ_JNY_ID , 'D'+cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY as varchar(10))+' ['+WAY_CODE+']' as ENQ_JNY_DAY1 , F_ADD, TO_ADD, TO_ADD2, CITY_ID FROM ENQ_JNY WHERE SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID ORDER BY ENQ_JNY_DAY

select cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY as int) as ed,'D'+cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY as varchar(10))+' ['+WAY_CODE+']' as ENQ_JNY_DAY , ENQ_JNY_ID , F_ADD , TO_ADD , TO_ADD2 , CITY_ID FROM ENQ_JNY WHERE ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID ORDER BY ed

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
-- EWA_SQL_SPLIT_NO SELECT FLOW_STATE FROM ENQ_MAIN a INNER JOIN grp_main gm ON a.grp_id = gm.grp_id WHERE a.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID AND gm.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' -- 散拼可以改，要改航班和日期，2025-01-22，吕国芳 ;
WITH BUDGET AS ( -- 预算 SELECT ENQ_JNY_ID EJ, SUM(A * ISNULL(C.GRP_POINT, 1)) BUDGET FROM ( SELECT C.GRP_ID, C.ENQ_ID, A.ENQ_JNY_ID, COIN_ID, SUM(ENQ_JNY_PRICE * SUB_NUM) A FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB A INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY B ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID = B.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_MAIN C ON B.ENQ_ID = C.ENQ_ID WHERE C.GRP_ID > 0 AND C.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND C.ENQ_STATE = 'USED' AND ( C.enq_id = @enq_id OR ( ( @enq_id = '' OR @enq_id IS NULL ) AND C.enq_select_state = 'CHECKED_TRUE' AND C.GRP_ID = @GRP_ID AND C.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID ) ) GROUP BY C.GRP_ID, C.ENQ_ID, A.ENQ_JNY_ID, COIN_ID ) A INNER JOIN GRP_MAIN B ON A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN GRP_COIN C ON C.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND B.GRP_COIN = C.COIN_TO AND A.COIN_ID = C.COIN_FROM GROUP BY ENQ_JNY_ID ) SELECT e1.*, @EWA.PATH_UPLOAD_URL + PM.PIC_PATH + '$resized/320x240.jpg' AS ENQ_PIC, BUDGET.BUDGET, CONVERT(VARCHAR, e1.ENQ_JNY_DATE, 112) DT -- 用于营地课程关联 FROM ENQ_JNY e1 LEFT JOIN PIC_MAIN PM ON PM.REF_ID = E1.ENQ_jny_ID AND PM.REF_TAG = 'ENQ_JNY' AND PM.PIC_STATUS = 'WEB_NWS_DLV' INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT SD_DATA FROM share_data WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' AND GRP_ID = @GRP_ID ) share_data ON share_data.SD_DATA = @G_SUP_ID LEFT JOIN BUDGET ON E1.ENQ_JNY_ID = BUDGET.EJ WHERE e1.enq_id = @enq_id ORDER BY e1.ENQ_JNY_DAY

Set.Name: OnFrameDelete SQL
ExtendAction1 SQL
GetState Sql
Set.Sql: SELECT FLOW_STATE FROM ENQ_MAIN em INNER JOIN GRP_MAIN gm ON em.GRP_ID = gm.GRP_ID WHERE em.ENQ_ID =@enq_id AND (em.FLOW_STATE IN ('ENQ_END', 'ENQ_CONTRACT_VALID','ENQ_CUS_YES') or gm.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') -- AND gm.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' -- 散拼可以改，要改航班和日期，2025-01-22，吕国芳 ;

Set.Name: UpdateImage Sql
Set.Sql:
UPDATE PIC_MAIN SET PIC_STATUS='WEB_NWS_DEL' WHERE REF_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND REF_TAG='ENQ_JNY' ;
INSERT INTO PIC_MAIN(REF_ID, REF_TAG, PIC_NAME, PIC_MEMO, PIC_TYPE , PIC_PATH, PIC_REAL_PATH, PIC_MD5, PIC_UNID, PIC_CDATE , PIC_LENGTH, PIC_ORD, ADM_ID, PIC_STATUS, SUP_ID,PIC_REF_ID ) select @ENQ_JNY_ID, 'ENQ_JNY', PIC_NAME, null, PIC_TYPE , PIC_PATH, PIC_REAL_PATH, PIC_MD5, @SYS_UNID, @SYS_DATE , PIC_LENGTH, 1, @G_ADM_ID, 'WEB_NWS_DLV', @G_SUP_ID,PIC_ID from PIC_MAIN where PIC_ID=@PIC_ID ;

Set.Name: deleteImage Sql
Set.Sql: UPDATE PIC_MAIN SET PIC_STATUS='WEB_NWS_DEL' WHERE REF_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND REF_TAG='ENQ_JNY' and sup_id=@g_sup_id

Set.Name: setImageAsCover sql
Set.Sql: UPDATE GRP_GYAP_DOC SET TITLE_IMG = ( SELECT TOP 1 @EWA.PATH_UPLOAD_URL + PIC_PATH FROM PIC_MAIN WHERE REF_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND REF_TAG='ENQ_JNY' AND PIC_STATUS = 'WEB_NWS_DLV' ORDER BY PIC_ID DESC ) WHERE SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND GRP_GYAP_STATE='USED' AND GRP_ID in (select GRP_ID from enq_main where enq_id=@enq_id)

upContentEn

Set.Name: modifyLogs SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT b.enq_jny_day, count(*) changes FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_LOG a INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY b ON a.ENQ_JNY_ID = b.ENQ_JNY_ID WHERE b.grp_id = @grp_id GROUP BY enq_jny_day

Set.Name: GetServices SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT a.SER_ID, a.TAG_NAME0, a.TAG_NAME1, a.TAG_NAME2, a.TAG_NAME3, a.TAG_NAME4, a.TAG_NAME5, a.TAG_NAME6, a.TAG_NAME7, a.TAG_NAME8, a.TAG_NAME9, a.TAG_NAME10, a.TAG_NAME11, ejss.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_TMP_RID, a.PROVIDER_SUP_NAME, a.PROVIDER_SUP_ADDR, sm.SUP_TELE, sm.SUP_MOBILE, ct.CRM_CUS_NAME, ct.CRM_CUS_EMAIL, ct.CRM_CUS_TELE, ct.CRM_CUS_MOBILE FROM V_SER_CONN_DETAIL a INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB ejss ON a.SER_CONN_ID = ejss.SER_CONN_ID LEFT JOIN sup_main sm ON a.PROVIDER_SUP_ID = sm.SUP_ID AND ejss.SUP_ID = @g_sup_id LEFT JOIN crm_conn cc ON cc.sup_down_id = sm.SUP_ID AND cc.sup_up_id = @g_sup_id LEFT JOIN crm_cus ct ON cc.crm_com_id = ct.crm_com_id AND ct.CRM_CUS_MASTER = 'COM_YES' WHERE ejss.FRO_ENQ_ID = @enq_id

Set.Name: GetDayDes SQL
Set.Sql: --服务描述 SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID, EJD_TAG, EJD_TIME_BEGIN, EJD_TIME_END,EDJ_PLACE_BEGIN ,EDJ_PLACE_END,EDJ_REMARK,EJD_CITY_ID,SER_KEY0,SER_KEY1,SER_KEY2 ,A.DAY_NAME, B.REC_NAME,C.SER_ID FROM ENQ_JNY_DAY A LEFT JOIN REC_MAIN B ON A.GUIDE1=B.REC_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY C ON A.SER_KEY0=C.SER_KEY_ID WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND ENQ_JNY_DAY IN ( SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY FROM ENQ_JNY WHERE ENQ_JNY_ID=@ENQ_JNY_ID ) AND EJD_CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND EJD_TAG IS NOT NULL

Set.Name: GetEditSerConn SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 1 A.*,B.SUP_NAME FROM SER_CONN A INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN B ON A.SUP_ID=B.SUP_ID WHERE SER_ID=@SER_ID AND CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND own_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID and not SER_CONN_UPDATE_TIME is null and @tp=1 ORDER BY SER_CONN_UPDATE_TIME DESC ) AA UNION SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 1 A.*,B.SUP_NAME FROM SER_CONN A INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN B ON A.SUP_ID=B.SUP_ID WHERE SER_ID=@SER_ID AND CITY_ID=@CITY_ID AND own_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID and @tp=0 ORDER BY SER_CONN_ID DESC ) BB

Set.Name: saveinfo
Set.Sql: UPDATE enq_jny SET enq_jny_day = @enq_jny_day , enq_jny_date = @enq_jny_date , traffic = @traffic , air_no = @air_no , air_time = @air_time , enq_jny_content = @enq_jny_content , ENQ_JNY_CONTENT_EN=@ENQ_JNY_CONTENT_EN , MEAL_ID=@MEAL_ID WHERE enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id and sup_id = @g_sup_id

检查营地状况 sql

Set.Name: 订单信息
Set.Sql:
-- 订单信息 SELECT a.ENQ_OP_ID, C.SELECT_STATE, C.FLOW_STATE, B.ENQ_JNY_DAY, A.SER_KEY0, A.SER_KEY1, A.SER_KEY2, A.SER_CITY_ID, A.SUB_NUM AS SUB_NUM_SUP, a.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP, a.ENQ_JNY_PRICE, a.COIN_ID_SUP, D.SUP_NAME, D.SUP_ID, A.EOMS_FREE -- 免额（2025-07） FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB A INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY B ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID = B.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN C ON C.ENQ_OP_ID = A.ENQ_OP_ID INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN D ON C.SUP_ID = D.SUP_ID WHERE C.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID AND ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED' ORDER BY C.SELECT_STATE DESC, D.SUP_NAME;
SELECT SUPS.*, B.PAY_REAL, C.COIN_NAME, C.COIN_KEY FROM ( -- 所有供应商和货币 SELECT GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, RELATE_SUP_ID AS SUP_ID, COIN_ID, SUM(COS_PRICE) AS PAY_PLAN FROM grp_fin_type WHERE grp_id = @grp_id AND fin_type = '0' AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM IN ('ENQ_OP_MAIN', 'GRP_SER_SP') AND sup_id = @G_SUP_ID GROUP BY GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID ) SUPS LEFT JOIN ( -- 实际支出 SELECT PAY_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, SUM(ACCOUNT) AS PAY_REAL FROM GRP_PAY_APPLY A INNER JOIN grp_fin_type B ON A.GRP_FIN_TYPE = B.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM IN ('ENQ_OP_MAIN', 'GRP_SER_SP') WHERE A.GRP_ID = @grp_id AND APPLY_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND APPLY_STATUS = 'VIS_FIN_END' GROUP BY PAY_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID ) B ON SUPS.SUP_ID = B.PAY_SUP_ID AND SUPS.COIN_ID = B.COIN_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN C ON SUPS.COIN_ID = C.COIN_ID;

Set.Name: GetModifiedLogs
Set.Sql: SELECT isnull(a.ser_city_id, a.new_ser_city_id) ser_city_id, b.enq_jny_day, isnull(a.ser_id, a.new_ser_id) ser_id, count(*) AS changes FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_LOG a INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY b ON a.ENQ_JNY_ID = b.ENQ_JNY_ID -- 筛选出所有第X天的变化 INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY c ON b.enq_jny_day = c.enq_jny_day AND c.enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id WHERE b.grp_id = @grp_id GROUP BY isnull(a.ser_city_id, a.new_ser_city_id), b.enq_jny_day, isnull(a.ser_id, a.new_ser_id)

Set.Name: 订单信息
Set.Sql:
-- 订单信息 SELECT a.ENQ_OP_ID, C.SELECT_STATE, C.FLOW_STATE, B.ENQ_JNY_DAY, A.SER_KEY0, A.SER_KEY1, A.SER_KEY2, A.SER_CITY_ID, A.SUB_NUM AS SUB_NUM_SUP, a.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP, a.ENQ_JNY_PRICE, a.COIN_ID_SUP, D.SUP_NAME, D.SUP_ID, A.EOMS_FREE -- 免额（2025-07） FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB A INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY B ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID = B.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN C ON C.ENQ_OP_ID = A.ENQ_OP_ID and own_sup_id = @G_SUP_ID INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN D ON C.SUP_ID = D.SUP_ID WHERE C.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID AND ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED' ORDER BY C.SELECT_STATE DESC, D.SUP_NAME;
SELECT SUPS.*, B.PAY_REAL, C.COIN_NAME, C.COIN_KEY FROM ( -- 所有供应商和货币 SELECT GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, RELATE_SUP_ID AS SUP_ID, COIN_ID, SUM(COS_PRICE) AS PAY_PLAN FROM grp_fin_type WHERE grp_id = @grp_id AND fin_type = '0' AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM IN ('ENQ_OP_MAIN', 'GRP_SER_SP') AND sup_id = @G_SUP_ID GROUP BY GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID ) SUPS LEFT JOIN ( -- 实际支出 SELECT PAY_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, SUM(ACCOUNT) AS PAY_REAL FROM GRP_PAY_APPLY A INNER JOIN grp_fin_type B ON A.GRP_FIN_TYPE = B.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM IN ('ENQ_OP_MAIN', 'GRP_SER_SP') WHERE A.GRP_ID = @grp_id AND APPLY_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND APPLY_STATUS = 'VIS_FIN_END' GROUP BY PAY_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID ) B ON SUPS.SUP_ID = B.PAY_SUP_ID AND SUPS.COIN_ID = B.COIN_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN C ON SUPS.COIN_ID = C.COIN_ID;

Set.Name: 等待客户确认或已成团
OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
-- EWA_SQL_SPLIT_NO SELECT FLOW_STATE, case when gm.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' or FLOW_STATE IN ('ENQ_END', 'ENQ_CONTRACT_VALID','ENQ_CUS_YES') then 'Y' else '' end IS_READONLY FROM ENQ_MAIN em INNER JOIN grp_main gm ON em.grp_id = gm.grp_id WHERE em.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID AND (em.FLOW_STATE IN ('ENQ_END', 'ENQ_CONTRACT_VALID','ENQ_CUS_YES') or gm.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') -- AND gm.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' -- 散拼可以改，要改航班和日期，2025-01-22，吕国芳 ;
WITH BUDGET AS ( -- 预算 SELECT ENQ_JNY_ID EJ, SUM(A * ISNULL(C.GRP_POINT, 1)) BUDGET FROM ( SELECT C.GRP_ID, C.ENQ_ID, A.ENQ_JNY_ID, COIN_ID, SUM(ENQ_JNY_PRICE * SUB_NUM) A FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB A INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY B ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID = B.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_MAIN C ON B.ENQ_ID = C.ENQ_ID WHERE C.GRP_ID > 0 AND C.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND C.ENQ_STATE = 'USED' AND ( C.enq_id = @enq_id OR ( ( @enq_id = '' OR @enq_id IS NULL ) AND C.enq_select_state = 'CHECKED_TRUE' AND C.GRP_ID = @GRP_ID AND C.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID ) ) GROUP BY C.GRP_ID, C.ENQ_ID, A.ENQ_JNY_ID, COIN_ID ) A INNER JOIN GRP_MAIN B ON A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN GRP_COIN C ON C.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND B.GRP_COIN = C.COIN_TO AND A.COIN_ID = C.COIN_FROM GROUP BY ENQ_JNY_ID ) SELECT e1.*, @EWA.PATH_UPLOAD_URL + PM.PIC_PATH + '$resized/320x240.jpg' AS ENQ_PIC, BUDGET.BUDGET, CONVERT(VARCHAR, e1.ENQ_JNY_DATE, 112) DT -- 用于营地课程关联 FROM ENQ_JNY e1 LEFT JOIN PIC_MAIN PM ON PM.REF_ID = E1.ENQ_jny_ID AND PM.REF_TAG = 'ENQ_JNY' AND PM.PIC_STATUS = 'WEB_NWS_DLV' INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT SD_DATA FROM share_data WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' AND GRP_ID = @GRP_ID ) share_data ON share_data.SD_DATA = @G_SUP_ID LEFT JOIN BUDGET ON E1.ENQ_JNY_ID = BUDGET.EJ WHERE e1.enq_id = @enq_id ORDER BY e1.ENQ_JNY_DAY

GetState Sql

Set.Name: UpdateImage Sql
Set.Sql:
UPDATE PIC_MAIN SET PIC_STATUS='WEB_NWS_DEL' WHERE REF_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND REF_TAG='ENQ_JNY' ;
INSERT INTO PIC_MAIN(REF_ID, REF_TAG, PIC_NAME, PIC_MEMO, PIC_TYPE , PIC_PATH, PIC_REAL_PATH, PIC_MD5, PIC_UNID, PIC_CDATE , PIC_LENGTH, PIC_ORD, ADM_ID, PIC_STATUS, SUP_ID,PIC_REF_ID ) select @ENQ_JNY_ID, 'ENQ_JNY', PIC_NAME, null, PIC_TYPE , PIC_PATH, PIC_REAL_PATH, PIC_MD5, @SYS_UNID, @SYS_DATE , PIC_LENGTH, 1, @G_ADM_ID, 'WEB_NWS_DLV', @G_SUP_ID,PIC_ID from PIC_MAIN where PIC_ID=@PIC_ID ;

Set.Name: deleteImage Sql
Set.Sql: UPDATE PIC_MAIN SET PIC_STATUS='WEB_NWS_DEL' WHERE REF_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND REF_TAG='ENQ_JNY' and sup_id=@g_sup_id

Set.Name: setImageAsCover sql
Set.Sql: UPDATE GRP_GYAP_DOC SET TITLE_IMG = ( SELECT TOP 1 @EWA.PATH_UPLOAD_URL + PIC_PATH FROM PIC_MAIN WHERE REF_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND REF_TAG='ENQ_JNY' AND PIC_STATUS = 'WEB_NWS_DLV' ORDER BY PIC_ID DESC ) WHERE SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND GRP_GYAP_STATE='USED' AND GRP_ID in (select GRP_ID from enq_main where enq_id=@enq_id)

upContentEn

Set.Name: modifyLogs SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT b.enq_jny_day, count(*) changes FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_LOG a INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY b ON a.ENQ_JNY_ID = b.ENQ_JNY_ID WHERE b.grp_id = @grp_id GROUP BY enq_jny_day

Set.Name: GetServices SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT a.SER_ID, a.TAG_NAME0, a.TAG_NAME1, a.TAG_NAME2, a.TAG_NAME3, a.TAG_NAME4, a.TAG_NAME5, a.TAG_NAME6, a.TAG_NAME7, a.TAG_NAME8, a.TAG_NAME9, a.TAG_NAME10, a.TAG_NAME11, ejss.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_TMP_RID, a.PROVIDER_SUP_NAME, a.PROVIDER_SUP_ADDR, sm.SUP_TELE, sm.SUP_MOBILE, ct.CRM_CUS_NAME, ct.CRM_CUS_EMAIL, ct.CRM_CUS_TELE, ct.CRM_CUS_MOBILE FROM V_SER_CONN_DETAIL a INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB ejss ON a.SER_CONN_ID = ejss.SER_CONN_ID LEFT JOIN sup_main sm ON a.PROVIDER_SUP_ID = sm.SUP_ID AND ejss.SUP_ID = @g_sup_id LEFT JOIN crm_conn cc ON cc.sup_down_id = sm.SUP_ID AND cc.sup_up_id = @g_sup_id LEFT JOIN crm_cus ct ON cc.crm_com_id = ct.crm_com_id AND ct.CRM_CUS_MASTER = 'COM_YES' WHERE ejss.FRO_ENQ_ID = @enq_id

Set.Name: GetPois SQL
Set.Sql:
-- 0 关联的景点 SELECT em.SUP_ID, a.SER_ID, a.SER_CONN_ID, ejss.ENQ_JNY_ID, ejss.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_TMP_RID , c.PI_UNID, c.PI_NAME, c.PI_SUMMARY, c.PI_RATING FROM enq_main em INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB ejss ON em.ENQ_ID = ejss.FRO_ENQ_ID AND em.SUP_ID = ejss.SUP_ID INNER JOIN SER_CONN a ON ejss.SER_CONN_ID = a.SER_CONN_ID INNER JOIN ser_key b ON a.SER_KEY0 = b.ser_key_id INNER JOIN ser_tag st ON b.TAG0 = st.SER_TAG_ID AND st.SER_TAG_REF_TABLE = 'POI_INFO' INNER JOIN POI_INFO c ON st.SER_TAG_REF_ID = c.pi_ID AND c.PI_STATUS = 'USED' WHERE em.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID ; -- 1 关联景点的图片 SELECT ejss.ENQ_JNY_ID, ejss.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_TMP_RID , c.PI_UNID, d.PP_UNID FROM enq_main em INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB ejss ON em.ENQ_ID = ejss.FRO_ENQ_ID AND em.SUP_ID = ejss.SUP_ID INNER JOIN SER_CONN a ON ejss.SER_CONN_ID = a.SER_CONN_ID INNER JOIN ser_key b ON a.SER_KEY0 = b.ser_key_id INNER JOIN ser_tag st ON b.TAG0 = st.SER_TAG_ID AND st.SER_TAG_REF_TABLE = 'POI_INFO' INNER JOIN POI_INFO c ON st.SER_TAG_REF_ID = c.pi_ID AND c.PI_STATUS = 'USED' INNER JOIN POI_PIC d ON c.pi_ID = d.pi_ID AND PP_STATUS = 'USED' WHERE em.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID ORDER BY PP_IS_PRIMARY DESC, PP_ORDER;
-- 2 行程描述中添加的景点 SELECT c.ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID, d.PI_UNID, d.PI_NAME, d.PI_SUMMARY, d.PI_RATING FROM ENQ_JNY_DAY a INNER JOIN enq_jny b ON a.enq_jny_id = b.enq_jny_id AND b.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY_DAY_POI c ON a.ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID = c.ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID INNER JOIN poi_info d ON c.PI_ID = d.PI_ID AND d.PI_STATUS = 'USED'; -- 3 行程描述中添加的景点的图片 SELECT c.ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID, e.PP_UNID, d.PI_UNID FROM ENQ_JNY_DAY a INNER JOIN enq_jny b ON a.enq_jny_id = b.enq_jny_id AND b.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY_DAY_POI c ON a.ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID = c.ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID INNER JOIN poi_info d ON c.PI_ID = d.PI_ID AND d.PI_STATUS = 'USED' INNER JOIN poi_pic E ON d.PI_ID = e.PI_ID AND E.PP_STATUS = 'USED' ; -- 4 酒店/餐厅/访学的介绍 SELECT em.SUP_ID, a.SER_ID, a.SER_CONN_ID, ejss.ENQ_JNY_ID, ejss.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_TMP_RID as ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID, c.PI_UNID, c.PI_NAME, c.PI_SUMMARY, c.PI_RATING FROM enq_main em INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB ejss ON em.ENQ_ID = ejss.FRO_ENQ_ID AND em.SUP_ID = ejss.SUP_ID INNER JOIN SER_CONN a ON ejss.SER_CONN_ID = a.SER_CONN_ID inner join sup_main sm on a.SER_CONN_PROVIDER_SUP_ID = sm.SUP_ID and sm.SUP_REF_TABLE ='POI_INFO' INNER JOIN POI_INFO c ON sm.SUP_REF_ID = c.pi_ID AND c.PI_STATUS = 'USED' where enq_id = @enq_id and a.ser_id in (2,4,13) ; -- 5 酒店/餐厅/访学的介绍图片 SELECT ejss.ENQ_JNY_ID, ejss.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_TMP_RID as ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID, c.PI_UNID, d.PP_UNID FROM enq_main em INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB ejss ON em.ENQ_ID = ejss.FRO_ENQ_ID AND em.SUP_ID = ejss.SUP_ID INNER JOIN SER_CONN a ON ejss.SER_CONN_ID = a.SER_CONN_ID inner join sup_main sm on a.SER_CONN_PROVIDER_SUP_ID = sm.SUP_ID and sm.SUP_REF_TABLE ='POI_INFO' INNER JOIN POI_INFO c ON sm.SUP_REF_ID = c.pi_ID AND c.PI_STATUS = 'USED' INNER JOIN POI_PIC d ON c.pi_ID = d.pi_ID AND PP_STATUS = 'USED' WHERE em.ENQ_ID = @enq_id and a.ser_id in (2,4,13) ORDER BY PP_IS_PRIMARY DESC, PP_ORDER;

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT a.* FROM ( SELECT A.*, b.enq_jny_id, c.enq_jny_day, c.enq_jny_date, b.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_TMP_RID, b.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID, b.ENQ_JNY_PRICE, b.SUB_NUM, b.ENQ_JNY_PRICE * b.SUB_NUM AS TOTAL_SUP FROM v_ser_conn_detail a INNER JOIN enq_jny_ser_sub b ON a.ser_conn_id = b.ser_conn_id INNER JOIN enq_jny c ON b.enq_jny_id = c.enq_jny_id INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT SD_DATA FROM share_data WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' AND GRP_ID = @GRP_ID ) share_data ON share_data.SD_DATA = @G_SUP_ID -- ewa_test @up_enq_op_id is not null INNER JOIN enq_op_main_sub mm ON mm.enq_op_id = @up_enq_op_id AND b.ser_id = mm.ser_id AND b.SER_CITY_ID = mm.SER_CITY_ID AND b.SER_KEY0 = mm.SER_KEY0 AND b.SER_KEY1 = mm.SER_KEY1 AND b.SER_KEY2 = mm.SER_KEY2 AND b.ENQ_JNY_ID = mm.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN enq_op_main m ON m.enq_op_id = mm.enq_op_id AND m.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID -- ewa_test WHERE 1 = 1 -- ewa_test @up_enq_op_id is null AND b.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID -- ewa_test AND a.ser_conn_ver = '2026' AND b.enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id ) a WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY a.SER_ID;
-- ewa_table_name ser_tag_names SELECT SER_ID, SER_TAG_NAME, SER_TAG_NAME_EN, SER_TAG_FOR_TAG FROM ser_tag WHERE ser_tag = 'NAME' ORDER BY SER_ID, SER_TAG_FOR_TAG

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: -- ewa_sql_split_no SELECT top 1 'Y' IS_READONLY FROM ENQ_MAIN em INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY ej ON ej.ENQ_ID = em.ENQ_ID INNER JOIN GRP_MAIN gm ON em.GRP_ID = gm.GRP_ID WHERE (em.FLOW_STATE IN ('ENQ_END', 'ENQ_CONTRACT_VALID','ENQ_CUS_YES') or gm.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') and ej.ENQ_JNY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID -- AND gm.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' -- 散拼可以改，要改航班和日期，2025-01-22，吕国芳 ; -- EWA_SQL_SPLIT_NO (判断是否为新版本) SELECT CASE WHEN f_date > '2025-11-17' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS new_version FROM enq_main WHERE enq_id = @enq_id; -- EWA_SQL_SPLIT_NO (判断是否为旅行类团组且不包括签证和机票) SELECT '1' IS_TRAVEL_GRP from grp_main gm inner join enq_main em on gm.grp_id=em.grp_id inner join bas_tag bt on gm.GRP_TYPE = bt.BAS_TAG where bt.bas_tag_para6='GRP_TYPE_CAT_TRAVEL' and bt.BAS_TAG not in ('GRP_TYPE_AIR_TICKET','GRP_QZ') and em.enq_id=@enq_id ; -- 导入默认时程 INSERT INTO ENQ_JNY_DAY ( GRP_ID, ENQ_JNY_ID, ENQ_JNY_DATE, EJD_TIME_BUCKET, EJD_TIME_BEGIN, EJD_TIME_END, EDJ_REMARK, EJD_SER_TAG_DES, CREATE_TIME, REF_TABLE, EJD_STATUS, SUP_ID, ADM_ID ) SELECT GRP_ID, ENQ_JNY_ID, ENQ_JNY_DATE, BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_PARA1, BAS_TAG_PARA2, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_PARA4, -- 服务标记 来源 BAS_TAG_GRP = SER_DES @sys_date, 'CUSTOM-TIME-SCHEDULE', 'USED', @G_SUP_ID, @g_adm_id FROM enq_jny a INNER JOIN bas_tag b ON b.bas_tag_grp = 'ENQ_TIME' AND a.enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id -- ewa_test @new_version is null or @IS_TRAVEL_GRP is null AND bas_tag = 'ENQ_TIME_UNDEFINED' -- 旧版本，只提供通用, 旅行类团组且不包括签证和机票 -- ewa_test AND NOT bas_tag IN ( SELECT EJD_TIME_BUCKET FROM ENQ_JNY_DAY WHERE enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id AND EJD_TIME_BUCKET IS NOT NULL ) and (not exists( select 1 from ENQ_JNY_DAY where ENQ_JNY_ID=@ENQ_JNY_ID and REF_TABLE='CUSTOM-TIME-SCHEDULE' and EJD_STATUS='USED') or bas_tag = 'ENQ_TIME_UNDEFINED' ) ; update ENQ_JNY_DAY set EJD_STATUS = 'USED' where enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id and EJD_TIME_BUCKET='ENQ_TIME_UNDEFINED' and EJD_STATUS='DEL' AND SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID ; SELECT a.ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID, a.GRP_ID, a.ENQ_JNY_ID, a.ENQ_JNY_DAY, a.ENQ_JNY_DATE, a.EJD_TIME_BUCKET, a.EJD_TIME_BEGIN, a.EJD_TIME_END, a.EJD_TYPE, a.EJD_TAG, a.EDJ_PLACE_TAG, a.EDJ_PLACE_BEGIN, a.EDJ_PLACE_END, '' + case when a.EJD_MDATE is null or isnull(EJD_TIME_BUCKET,'')='ENQ_TIME_UNDEFINED' then '' else '' end + a.EJD_TIME_BEGIN + ' - ' + a.EJD_TIME_END + ' ' +a.EDJ_REMARK as EDJ_REMARK, a.GUIDE1, a.GUIDE2, a.CREATE_TIME, a.EJD_CITY_ID, a.REF_GRP_DAY_BUS_ID, a.DAY_NAME, a.REF_TABLE, a.SER_KEY0, a.SER_KEY1, a.SER_KEY2, a.GUIDES, a.EDJ_PLACE_BEGIN_EN, a.EDJ_PLACE_END_EN, a.GUIDES_EN, a.EDJ_REMARK_EN, a.REF_ID, a.EJD_TIME_SPAN, a.EJD_TRANSPORT_DISTANCE, a.EDJ_DESC, a.EDJ_DESC_EN, a.SER_ID, a.EJD_TMP_RID, a.EDJ_AIRLINES, a.EJD_SER_TAG_DES, case when a.EJD_MDATE is null then 'Y' else 'N' end CONFIRMED, bt.BAS_TAG_PARA3, CASE WHEN sm.SER_ID IS NOT NULL THEN sm.SER_ID WHEN bt.BAS_TAG_PARA3 = 'N/A' THEN 1 -- 通用默认机票 ELSE 7 END DEFAULT_SER_ID -- 景点 FROM ENQ_JNY_DAY A INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT SD_DATA FROM share_data WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' AND GRP_ID = @GRP_ID ) share_data ON share_data.SD_DATA = @G_SUP_ID LEFT JOIN bas_tag bt ON a.EJD_TIME_BUCKET = bt.bas_tag LEFT JOIN bas_tag bt2 ON a.EJD_SER_TAG_DES = bt2.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN ser_main sm ON sm.SUP_ID = 3 AND sm.SER_TAG = CASE WHEN isnull(bt2.BAS_TAG_PARA1, '') != '' THEN bt2.BAS_TAG_PARA1 ELSE bt.BAS_TAG_PARA3 END WHERE a.REF_TABLE = 'CUSTOM-TIME-SCHEDULE' AND A.EJD_STATUS = CASE WHEN @EWA_RECYCLE = '1' THEN 'DEL' ELSE 'USED' END AND A.ENQ_JNY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID -- ewa_test @ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID is not null and a.ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID -- ewa_test ORDER BY CASE WHEN isnull(a.EJD_TIME_BUCKET, '') = 'ENQ_TIME_UNDEFINED' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, len(EJD_TIME_BEGIN), -- 将 12:31+1 排序到后面 EJD_TIME_BEGIN, EJD_TIME_END; -- ewa_table_name ser_tags SELECT SER_TAG, SER_ID FROM ser_main WHERE SUP_ID = 3 AND ser_ob3 = 'USED'

Set.Name: UAct0 SQL
Set.Sql: INSERT INTO ENQ_JNY_DAY ( GRP_ID, ENQ_JNY_ID, ENQ_JNY_DATE, EJD_TIME_BUCKET, EJD_TIME_BEGIN, EJD_TIME_END, EDJ_REMARK, EJD_SER_TAG_DES, CREATE_TIME, REF_TABLE, EJD_STATUS, SUP_ID, ADM_ID ) SELECT GRP_ID, ENQ_JNY_ID, ENQ_JNY_DATE, BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_PARA1, BAS_TAG_PARA2, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_PARA4, -- 服务标记 来源 BAS_TAG_GRP = SER_DES @sys_date, 'CUSTOM-TIME-SCHEDULE', 'USED', @G_SUP_ID, @g_adm_id FROM enq_jny a INNER JOIN bas_tag b ON b.bas_tag_grp = 'ENQ_TIME' AND a.enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id AND NOT bas_tag IN ( SELECT EJD_TIME_BUCKET FROM ENQ_JNY_DAY WHERE enq_jny_id = @enq_jny_id AND EJD_TIME_BUCKET IS NOT NULL )

Set.Name: ConfirmAll SQL
Set.Sql: update ENQ_JNY_DAY set EJD_MDATE = getdate() WHERE ENQ_JNY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID AND SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND EJD_STATUS = 'USED' AND isnull(EJD_TIME_BUCKET,'')!='ENQ_TIME_UNDEFINED'

Set.Name: CheckError SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT top 1 case when gm.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' then '已成团不能修改' else '审批流程已到等待客户确认，不能修改' end EWA_ERR_OUT FROM ENQ_MAIN em INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY ej ON ej.ENQ_ID = em.ENQ_ID INNER JOIN GRP_MAIN gm ON em.GRP_ID = gm.GRP_ID WHERE (em.FLOW_STATE IN ('ENQ_END', 'ENQ_CONTRACT_VALID','ENQ_CUS_YES') or gm.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ') -- ewa_test @ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID is null and ej.ENQ_JNY_ID=@ENQ_JNY_ID -- ewa_test @ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID is not null and ej.ENQ_JNY_ID in (select ENQ_JNY_ID from ENQ_JNY_DAY where ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_DAY_ID) -- ewa_test
-- AND gm.GRP_RUN_MODEL = 'GRP_RUN_SINGLE' -- 散拼可以改，要改航班和日期，2025-01-22，吕国芳

Set.User: @EDJ_REMARK @EDJ_REMARK

Set.Info: Determine the entire schedule for the day
